centers.english: to live in a place

examples.english: Where do you live?
examples.chinese: 你住在哪儿？

examples.english: Do you like living in Tokyo?
examples.chinese: 你喜欢住在东京吗?

examples.english: Judy lives in that nice house on the corner.
examples.chinese: 朱迪住在拐角的那幢漂亮房子里。

examples.english: How do you like living in the city again after so many years away from it?
examples.chinese: 离开了这个城市那么多年以后又回来住，感觉怎么样?

examples.english: In 1905 Russell was living at 4 Ralston Street.
examples.chinese: 1905年，罗素住在罗斯顿街4号。

examples.english: Donald is 30 years old, but he still lives at home.
examples.chinese: 唐纳德30岁了，但是仍然住在家里。

examples.english: They lived abroad for several years but moved back when the children were school age.
examples.chinese: 他们在国外住了几年，但是到了孩子上学的年龄就回国了。

examples.english: Many students prefer to live in during their first year of study.
examples.chinese: 许多学生第一年都喜欢住在学校里。

examples.english: My name's Sharon and I'm from Harlow.
examples.chinese: 我的名字叫沙伦，我来自哈洛。

examples.english: The man is believed to be from somewhere in the north of England.
examples.chinese: 那名男子据说是来自英格兰北部的某个地方。

examples.english: Where are you from?
examples.chinese: 你是哪里人？

examples.english: Miss Badu grew up in Dallas but now resides in Brooklyn.
examples.chinese: 巴杜小姐在达拉斯长大，但是现在住在布鲁克林。

examples.english: At that time there were many American writers residing in Paris.
examples.chinese: 那时候，有许多美国作家旅居巴黎。

examples.english: Miss Tonelli, how exactly did you come to reside at your current address?
examples.chinese: 托内利小姐，你到底是怎么来到现在这个地址居住的？

examples.english: The government bureau has prepared a booklet for U.S. citizens residing abroad.
examples.chinese: 政府部门给侨居海外的美国公民准备了一本小册子。

examples.english: This is the neighborhood where my father grew up.
examples.chinese: 我父亲就是在这个社区长大。

examples.english: Margaret Hallworth was born in Manchester but grew up in North Wales.
examples.chinese: 玛格丽特·霍尔沃思在曼彻斯特出生，但是在北威尔士长大。

examples.english: I grew up on a farm in eastern Pennsylvania.
examples.chinese: 我在宾夕法尼亚州东部的一个农场上长大。

examples.english: The island is mainly inhabited by sheep.
examples.chinese: 栖居在岛上的主要是绵羊。

examples.english: Some tribes still inhabit the more remote mountains and jungles of the country.
examples.chinese: 有些部落仍生活在该国的边远山区及丛林之中。

examples.english: This area of Antarctica is populated only by seals and penguins.
examples.chinese: 南极洲的这个地区只有海豹和企鹅栖居。

examples.english: Mindanao is an island in the southern Philippines heavily populated by Muslims.
examples.chinese: 棉兰老岛是菲律宾南部的一个海岛，穆斯林人口众多。

centers.english: to start to live in a place

examples.english: We lived in Thailand, then Singapore, and finally settled in Hong Kong.
examples.chinese: 我们在泰国住过，后来在新加坡也住过，最后在香港定居下来。

examples.english: The family settled in a small Nevada town where they opened a store.
examples.chinese: 那家人在内华达州的一个小镇上住了下来，在那里开了一家小店。

examples.english: They first set up house together in Atlanta and moved to Miami three years later.
examples.chinese: 他们最初在亚特兰大建立了家庭，三年后迁至迈阿密。

examples.english: He rarely left the Brooklyn apartment where he had set up house.
examples.chinese: 他在布鲁克林这套寓所里建立了自己的家，几乎足不出户。

examples.english: Her parents were very upset when she set up house with her boyfriend.
examples.chinese: 她和男友同居建立家庭，父母非常伤心。

examples.english: He left the country in December to take up residence in Panama.
examples.chinese: 12月份他离开祖国，在巴拿马居住了下来。

examples.english: In 1953 Diem took up residence at a monastery in Belgium.
examples.chinese: 1953年，迪姆在比利时的一个修道院里住了下来。

centers.english: when you live in the same house as someone else

examples.english: For two months I lived with a French family in Paris to improve my French.
examples.chinese: 我在巴黎一个法国人的家里住了两个月，以提高自己的法语水平。

examples.english: What's the name of the guy you live with?
examples.chinese: 和你同住的那家伙叫什么名字？

examples.english: We've been trying to persuade Jack's elderly mother to come and live with us.
examples.chinese: 我们一直在试图说服杰克年迈的母亲来与我们同住。

examples.english: My brother shares a house with four other students.
examples.chinese: 我哥哥和其他四个学生合住一幢房子。

examples.english: Kim and I shared an apartment when I first moved to L.A.
examples.chinese: 我刚搬来洛杉矶的时候和金合住一套公寓。

examples.english: Do you remember Diane? I roomed with her at college.
examples.chinese: 你还记得黛安娜吗？大学的时候我和她同住一个房间。

examples.english: Have you decided who you're going to room with next year?
examples.chinese: 你决定好明年和谁同住一个房间没有？

examples.english: This is Rosalind, my flatmate.
examples.chinese: 这是罗莎琳德，我的室友。

examples.english: You can't have a party without asking your flatmate first.
examples.chinese: 你不先问问你的室友就不能搞聚会。

examples.english: My roommate and I aren't getting along very well - I think I'm going to have to move.
examples.chinese: 我和室友相处得不是很好—我打算搬家了。

centers.english: to live with someone who you have a sexual relationship with

examples.english: I lived with Stuart for three years before we broke up.
examples.chinese: 我与斯图尔特同居了三年后分手了。

examples.english: Have you ever met the woman that Glen is living with?
examples.chinese: 你见过和格伦同居的那个女人了吗？

examples.english: These days people often live together before getting married.
examples.chinese: 现在很多人都是先同居后结婚。

examples.english: Al really wants us to live together, but I'm not sure I'm ready.
examples.chinese: 阿尔很希望我们住在一起，可是我不知道自己是否已准备好。

examples.english: Only about one in three couples who cohabit end up getting married.
examples.chinese: 同居的人中只有1/3左右最后是结婚的。

examples.english: Most divorcees either remarry or cohabit with another partner.
examples.chinese: 大多数离婚的人要么再结婚，要么与他人同居。

examples.english: In the past, cohabitation was strongly disapproved of.
examples.chinese: 过去，同居遭到人们的强烈反对。

examples.english: He's shacking up with some girl he met at the beach.
examples.chinese: 他和海滩上认识的一个女孩同居了。

examples.english: Once they were shacked up, all they did was fight.
examples.chinese: 他们同居了以后就是一个劲地吵架。

centers.english: someone who lives in a place

examples.english: In Ghana 46% of the population is under 16 years of age.
examples.chinese: 加纳有46%的人口都在16岁以下。

examples.english: The patients have been isolated to keep the disease from spreading to the rest of the population.
examples.chinese: 病人们被隔离起来，以防把疾病传给其他人。

examples.english: The population of Singapore is almost 3 million.
examples.chinese: 新加坡有近300万人口。

examples.english: Ninety percent of the adult population is literate.
examples.chinese: 90%的成年人有读写能力。

examples.english: The U.S. has a rate of population growth that is five times that of Europe.
examples.chinese: 美国的人口增长率是欧洲的五倍。

examples.english: Local residents are protesting about the new road.
examples.chinese: 当地居民抗议修建这条新道路。

examples.english: Parking spaces are for residents only.
examples.chinese: 泊位只供居民使用。

examples.english: Residents of Glacier Bay are complaining about the pollution caused by cruise ships.
examples.chinese: 银河湾的居民投诉游轮造成了污染。

examples.english: Copenhagen has about 1.4 million inhabitants.
examples.chinese: 哥本哈根约有140万名居民。

examples.english: This is a poor rural area, with only one doctor per 10,000 inhabitants.
examples.chinese: 这是一个贫穷的农村地区，平均一万人中只有一名医生。

examples.english: Nearly 36% of the inhabitants of Saudi Arabia are resident foreigners.
examples.chinese: 沙特阿拉伯有近36%的居民是外国侨民。

examples.english: The police asked if we were both British citizens.
examples.chinese: 警察问我们两人是否都是英国公民。

examples.english: The court's ruling should be of interest to every citizen of Texas.
examples.chinese: 法院的裁决应该会引起得克萨斯每一位公民的关注。

examples.english: If you get lost just ask one of the locals for directions.
examples.chinese: 如果你迷失方向，可向当地人问路。

examples.english: Denver International Airport was built in an area that locals call ‘Tornado Alley.’
examples.chinese: 丹佛国际机场建在被当地人称为“龙卷风巷”的一个地方。

examples.english: Tenants are not allowed to keep pets.
examples.chinese: 房客不得养宠物。

examples.english: Have you found any tenants for your house yet?
examples.chinese: 你的房子找到租户了没有?

examples.english: Twelve tenants of the Lockwood housing complex are taking part in the lawsuit against their landlord.
examples.chinese: 洛克伍德住宅楼的12个房客正在联合起诉他们的房东。

examples.english: They have left all the furniture and carpets in the house for the next occupant.
examples.chinese: 他们把屋子里所有家具和地毯都留给了下一个住户。

examples.english: Occupants of the building are understandably upset about the high-rise going up next door.
examples.chinese: 大楼内的居民对隔壁在建造的高层大厦不满，这是可以理解的。

examples.english: The document has to be signed by the occupier of every household.
examples.chinese: 文件须由每家住户签字。

examples.english: The new law affects everyone from tenants to owner-occupiers.
examples.chinese: 新法律影响到每个人，从租户至业主居住者。

examples.english: Police have removed over 50 squatters from the housing estate.
examples.chinese: 警方赶走了住宅区里五十多名擅自占房者。

examples.english: Squatters insist that without their work, the buildings would have deteriorated to the point of being unusable.
examples.chinese: 擅自占房者坚称，如果没有他们，这些楼房说不定已经破烂得不能使用了。

examples.english: Many of the earliest settlers here dies from disease and hunger.
examples.chinese: 这里最早的一批移民中有许多人死于疾病和饥饿。

examples.english: Settlers found a plentiful supply of fruit and game in the nearby forests.
examples.chinese: 殖民者发现附近的森林里有充足的野果和猎物。

centers.english: when a place has people living in it

examples.english: Only two of the islands are inhabited.
examples.chinese: 只有其中的两个岛有人居住。

examples.english: This tiny town has been an inhabited area for over 3,000 years.
examples.chinese: 这个小镇有人居住已经有三千多年了。

examples.english: None of the flats is occupied - they've only just been built.
examples.chinese: 所有的公寓都是空的—它们刚刚竣工。

examples.english: Bears are appearing more and more frequently in populated areas
examples.chinese: 熊在有人烟的地方出没越来越多。

examples.english: The north-east has always been more densely populated than the rest of the country.
examples.chinese: 东北部一向比该国其他地方人口稠密。

examples.english: French Guiana is a sparsely populated wilderness.
examples.chinese: 法属圭亚那是个人口稀少的荒芜地区。

examples.english: The museum is about 6 blocks from downtown in a quiet residential area.
examples.chinese: 博物馆位于距离市中心大约六个街区的一个安静的住宅区里。

examples.english: London's main airport is surrounded by densely populated residential areas.
examples.chinese: 伦敦的主要机场四周都是人口稠密的住宅区。

examples.english: The only sign of human habitation was a charred area where there had once been a fire.
examples.chinese: 有过人类居住的唯一迹象是有个地方曾经生过火而且被烧焦了。

centers.english: suitable/not suitable for people to live in

examples.english: There are already plans to renovate the buildings and make them habitable.
examples.chinese: 已经有计划要整修这些楼房，使它们可以住人。

examples.english: Japan is mostly mountainous and has a only a relatively narrow strip of habitable land along the coasts.
examples.chinese: 日本多为山区，只有沿海一条相对狭窄的地带适宜居住。

examples.english: As soon as the farm was fit to live in, we moved all our things there.
examples.chinese: 一等到农场可以住人时，我们马上把所有的东西都搬到了那儿。

expressions.text: not be fit to live in

examples.english: The first apartment we looked at just wasn't fit to live in.
examples.chinese: 我们看的第一套公寓根本不适于住人。

examples.english: A nuclear accident would make the whole region uninhabitable.
examples.chinese: 核事故会使整个地区都无法住人。

examples.english: Twenty of the houses damaged by the storm were declared uninhabitable.
examples.chinese: 遭暴风雨破坏的房子中有20栋被宣布不能居住。

examples.english: The court was told that Blake had charged hundreds of dollars in rent for rooms that were unfit for human habitation.
examples.chinese: 法庭被告知，布莱克收取几百美元的租金，而房间却不宜住人。

examples.english: In the 1960s, the flats were declared unfit for human habitation and demolished.
examples.chinese: 20世纪60年代，这些公寓被宣布不宜住人而拆除了。

centers.english: to die because you are old or ill

examples.english: I want to see Ireland again before I die.
examples.chinese: 我想在死前再看一眼爱尔兰。

examples.english: Many people are worried about growing old and dying alone.
examples.chinese: 许多人都害怕年迈孤独死去。

examples.english: No wonder your plants always die - you don't water them enough.
examples.chinese: 难怪你种的植物总是死，原来你不浇足水的。

examples.english: His son died of liver cancer three years ago.
examples.chinese: 他的儿子三年前死于肝癌。

examples.english: In the spring of her 93rd year, Miss Grantley died in her sleep.
examples.chinese: 格兰特利小姐93岁那年春天在睡梦中去世。

expressions.text: die a natural death/die of natural causes

examples.english: The autopsy said he had died of natural causes, but his family is not convinced.
examples.chinese: 尸体解剖的结论说他是自然死亡，但他的家属不同意这种说法。

examples.english: Have you heard? Carl passed away last night.
examples.chinese: 你听说了吗？卡特昨晚过世了。

examples.english: My wife had just passed away, and I didn't want to be around people.
examples.chinese: 我妻子刚刚去世，我想一个人静静。

examples.english: One of their neighbors just dropped dead on the tennis court.
examples.chinese: 他们有个邻居在网球场上突然死了。

examples.english: McSherry dropped dead of a heart attack in the middle of a baseball game.
examples.chinese: 麦克谢里在棒球比赛进行到一半时心脏病突发而死。

examples.english: When I kick the bucket you'll be able to live on my life insurance.
examples.chinese: 我一伸腿你就可以靠我的人寿保险金过活了。

examples.english: I feel like I've done everything I wanted to - I might as well snuff it.
examples.chinese: 我觉得自己想做的事都已做过了，我死而无悔了。

centers.english: to die in an accident, war, fight etc
centers.chinese: 在事故、战争、打斗等中死去

examples.english: The firefighters died when the warehouse floor collapsed.
examples.chinese: 仓库楼板坍塌，消防员丧生。

expressions.text: die/be killed in an accident/explosion/the war etc

examples.english: Two people were killed and four injured in a gas explosion this morning.
examples.chinese: 今晨发生的瓦斯爆炸中有两人死亡，四人受伤。

examples.english: His brother was killed in action in Vietnam.
examples.chinese: 他的弟弟在越战中阵亡。

examples.english: The baby starved to death.
examples.chinese: 这婴儿是饿死的。

examples.english: He bled to death after being stabbed repeatedly.
examples.chinese: 他被连刺数刀后失血致死。

examples.english: Hundreds of people lost their lives when the ship overturned in a storm.
examples.chinese: 船在风暴中倾覆，数百名乘客丧生。

examples.english: Supporters continue to visit the site where Colosio lost his life to an assassin's bullet.
examples.chinese: 仍有支持者前往克洛西奥在刺客枪口下丧生的地点凭吊。

examples.english: At the end of the film the prisoners are rescued, and the pirates come to a sticky end.
examples.chinese: 影片的结局是俘虏获救了，海盗则丧了命。

examples.english: Everyone aboard the ship perished when it sank off the coast of Maine.
examples.chinese: 船在缅因州海岸沉没，船上所有人都遇难了。

examples.english: Five children perished before firefighters could put out the blaze.
examples.chinese: 消防员扑灭大火前已有五名儿童丧生。

examples.english: US forces withdrew after suffering heavy losses.
examples.chinese: 美军在遭受重大伤亡之后撤退了。

examples.english: The troops suffered heavy losses fighting their way through the Italian countryside.
examples.chinese: 部队奋战穿过意大利乡间时伤亡惨重。

centers.english: to die when you are still young

examples.english: Like so many other pop stars, Jim Morrison died young.
examples.chinese: 和许多其他流行歌星一样，吉姆·莫里森也是英年早逝。

examples.english: a memorial to tens of thousands of allied soldiers, many of whom died so young
examples.chinese: 成千上万盟军阵亡将士的一座纪念碑，其中许多人牺牲时都很年轻

expressions.text: be cut off/down in your prime

examples.english: The movie tells the story of a popular athlete cut down in his prime.
examples.chinese: 该影片讲述的是一个英年早逝的著名运动员的故事。

expressions.text: be cut off/down in your prime by

examples.english: Dolly was an energetic woman who was suddenly cut off in her prime by scarlet fever.
examples.chinese: 多莉是个精力充沛的女子，却因患了猩红热而年纪轻轻就去世了。

examples.english: James Dean had made just three movies before his untimely death in 1955.
examples.chinese: 詹姆斯·迪安在1955年早逝前仅拍了三部影片。

centers.english: to die for your country or for something you believe in
centers.chinese: 为国家或为某种信念而死

examples.english: These brave men were ready to fight and die for their country.
examples.chinese: 这些勇敢的人已准备为祖国而战并牺牲。

examples.english: How many of you would be willing to die for your religion?
examples.chinese: 你们中间有多少人愿意为自己的宗教信仰而捐躯？

expressions.text: give your life/lay down your life

examples.english: We want to pay special tribute to the men and women who have given their lives in service of their country.
examples.chinese: 对那些为国捐躯的男女，我们谨致以特别的敬意。

expressions.text: give your life/lay down your life for

examples.english: He was ready to lay down his life for his comrades.
examples.chinese: 他已准备好为他的同志牺牲。

examples.english: The early Christian martyrs were killed by the thousands.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的早期基督教殉道者被屠杀。

expressions.text: make somebody a martyr/make a martyr out of somebody

examples.english: His death in police hands made him a martyr among the people.
examples.chinese: 他死在警察手上，使他成了人们心目中的烈士。

examples.english: His martyrdom encouraged the people to resist.
examples.chinese: 他的殉难激励人民进行抵抗。

examples.english: FBI agents found the passport of one of the suicide bombers among the wreckage.
examples.chinese: 联邦调查局探员在残骸中找到了其中一名自杀式炸弹袭击者的护照。

examples.english: Suicide pilots are brainwashed into believing they will go straight to paradise when they die.
examples.chinese: 自杀飞行员经过洗脑后相信自己死后能直接上天堂。

centers.english: when someone is going to die very soon

examples.english: He gave the dying man a drop of water from his flask.
examples.chinese: 他从自己的水壶里倒出一点水给那垂死的人喝。

examples.english: The priest was killed as he was giving the last rites to a dying man.
examples.chinese: 神父在给一位垂死的男子举行临终圣礼时被杀死了。

examples.english: Even as she lay dying in a hospital bed, she was still thinking of her children.
examples.chinese: 她躺在医院病床上生命垂危之际，仍念念不忘自己的孩子。

examples.english: When the fisherman spotted the boat, its crew were already close to death.
examples.chinese: 当渔夫发现那小船时，船员们已经奄奄一息了。

examples.english: Davis had suffered a stroke and was near death.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯曾患中风差点没命。

examples.english: My grandmother gave me that ring when she was on her deathbed.
examples.chinese: 祖母在临终时给了我那枚戒指。

examples.english: Thirty years later, on her deathbed, she confessed to the crime.
examples.chinese: 30年后，她在临终之际承认犯了那罪行。

examples.english: His skin was so pale, he looked like he was at death's door.
examples.chinese: 他肤色如此苍白，看上去像是命不久矣的模样。

centers.english: when someone dies

examples.english: After her husband's death, she moved back to California.
examples.chinese: 丈夫去世后，她搬回了加州。

examples.english: The bomb caused at least one death, and several serious injuries.
examples.chinese: 这次爆炸造成至少一人死亡，数人重伤。

examples.english: The number of deaths from AIDS is still increasing in many parts of the world.
examples.chinese: 世界上许多地方死于艾滋病的人数仍在不断增加。

examples.english: A comet appeared at the time of the death of Julius Caesar in 44 B.C.
examples.chinese: 公元前44年裘力斯·凯撒去世时，天空中出现了一颗彗星。

examples.english: The latest death toll in the Turkish earthquake is over 2000.
examples.chinese: 在土耳其地震中，最新的死亡人数超过2，000人。

examples.english: The policy provides full insurance in the case of accidental death.
examples.chinese: 这种保险为意外死亡提供全保。

examples.english: Basquiat's work had become well known even before his untimely death at age 27.
examples.chinese: 巴斯奎特的作品甚至在他27岁英年早逝之前就已声名远播了。

examples.english: Catherine will inherit a large sum of money on her father's death.
examples.chinese: 凯瑟琳在她父亲去世后可继承一大笔钱。

examples.english: A fifth of all road fatalities are caused by people not wearing seatbelts.
examples.chinese: 五分之一的公路死亡事故是因为人们没有系安全带。

examples.english: An attack on the city would cause tens of thousands of civilian fatalities.
examples.chinese: 对该城的攻击会造成数万平民死亡。

examples.english: The plane managed to crash-land on St. Lawrence Island with no loss of life.
examples.chinese: 这架飞机设法在圣劳伦斯岛上强行着陆，无人丧生。

examples.english: The Bishop condemned what he called ‘this futile and tragic loss of life’.
examples.chinese: 主教谴责他所称的这种“悲惨而无谓的牺牲”。

centers.english: when one of your relatives or friends dies

examples.english: Sharon lost her mother when she was very young.
examples.chinese: 莎伦年幼时母亲就去世了。

examples.english: It's a terrible thing to lose someone very close to you.
examples.chinese: 失去同你十分亲近的人是件很不幸的事。

examples.english: Tony's mother was widowed at the age of 23 with three children.
examples.chinese: 托尼的母亲23岁开始带着三个孩子守寡了。

examples.english: He's gone to stay with his widowed mother in Florida.
examples.chinese: 他去了佛罗里达州跟守寡的母亲同住。

examples.english: Ben was orphaned at an early age and raised by an uncle.
examples.chinese: 本年幼时就成了孤儿，由一位叔叔抚养大。

examples.english: a home for orphaned children
examples.chinese: 孤儿之家

examples.english: The bereaved mother stood by her son's grave.
examples.chinese: 这位痛失孩子的母亲站在儿子的墓边。

examples.english: Bereaved family members are demanding more information about the plane crash.
examples.chinese: 痛失亲人的死者家属要求了解飞机失事的更多情况。

examples.english: Jim's depression had been brought on by the bereavement he had suffered earlier in the year when a close relative or friend of yours dies.
examples.chinese: 吉姆那年早些时候痛失亲人后就一直很消沉。

examples.english: Bereavement counsellors people trained to help people who have been bereaved have been flown to the city.
examples.chinese: 丧亲辅导员乘飞机前往该市。

centers.english: an illness or accident that you die from
centers.chinese: 导致死亡的疾病或意外事故

examples.english: a fatal heart attack
examples.chinese: 致命的心脏病发作

examples.english: Meyer's car was involved in a fatal accident on the freeway.
examples.chinese: 迈耶的汽车涉入一桩致命的高速公路交通事故中。

examples.english: His father had been fatally injured in an explosion in the mine where he worked.
examples.chinese: 他父亲在所工作的煤矿发生爆炸时受了致命伤。

examples.english: Is the disease terminal?
examples.chinese: 这病是不治之症吗？

examples.english: She was recently told she has terminal cancer.
examples.chinese: 她最近得知自己患了晚期癌症。

examples.english: We need to improve the way we treat terminally ill patients.
examples.chinese: 我们要改进对绝症病人的治疗方法。

centers.english: to decay

examples.english: Freezing conditions will stop most things from decaying.
examples.chinese: 在冷冻情况下，大多数东西都不会腐烂。

examples.english: Some of the apples lying on the ground had already begun to decay.
examples.chinese: 地上的苹果有些已经开始腐烂了。

examples.english: In a warm climate where flesh decays rapidly, there is more risk of infection from dead animals.
examples.chinese: 在气候温暖的地方肉腐烂得快，人们更有可能被动物尸体感染。

examples.english: If you eat too many sweets, it'll make your teeth decay.
examples.chinese: 如果你吃过多的糖，会蛀坏你的牙齿的。

examples.english: the decaying remains of a dead sheep
examples.chinese: 死羊的腐尸

examples.english: The stream was blocked by decaying vegetation.
examples.chinese: 小溪被腐烂的植物堵塞了。

examples.english: If water gets inside the woodwork, it causes it to rot.
examples.chinese: 水进了木器里就会使其腐烂。

examples.english: In some countries food is left to rot, while in others people are dying from hunger.
examples.chinese: 在有些国家人们任由食物腐坏，而在另一些国家人们却死于饥饿。

examples.english: The roof had fallen in and the floor had completely rotted away.
examples.chinese: 屋顶已坍塌，地板已完全腐烂了。

examples.english: If you lift up a rotting log you will find all sorts of insects underneath.
examples.chinese: 要是你抬起一根腐烂的木头，就会发现底下有各种昆虫。

examples.english: As household refuse decomposes, it produces an explosive gas, methane.
examples.chinese: 家庭垃圾腐烂后会释出一种爆炸性气体—甲烷。

examples.english: A dead fish in the aquarium will decompose rapidly, fouling the water badly.
examples.chinese: 死鱼在鱼缸内会很快腐烂，严重污染水质。

examples.english: The men's decomposing bodies were found in a shallow grave in Epping forest.
examples.chinese: 在埃平森林的浅墓地里发现这些腐烂的男尸。

examples.english: Throw that bread away. It's gone mouldy.
examples.chinese: 把那块面包扔了，已经发霉了。

examples.english: If you don't keep cheese in the fridge, it goes mouldy very quickly.
examples.chinese: 假如你没把干酪放入冰箱，它很快就会发霉。

examples.english: Several of the pipes have rusted and will need to be replaced.
examples.chinese: 有几根管子已生锈，要换掉了。

examples.english: Parts of the floor of the car had simply rusted away.
examples.chinese: 汽车底盘的一部分已经锈光了。

examples.english: The barn was full of rusting old farm machinery.
examples.chinese: 谷仓里全是些锈迹斑斑的旧农耕机械。

examples.english: By the time they found the wreckage of the plane, it had already started to corrode.
examples.chinese: 他们找到飞机的残骸时，它已开始生锈了。

examples.english: Corroding radiators are a problem because they may start to leak.
examples.chinese: 散热器生锈很麻烦，因为它可能会漏水。

centers.english: something that has decayed

examples.english: There was a disgusting smell in the house - a bit like rotten eggs.
examples.chinese: 屋子里有股难闻的气味，有点像臭鸡蛋。

examples.english: I wouldn't climb that tree if I were you - some of the branches look rotten.
examples.chinese: 要是我就不会去爬那棵树，有些树枝看起来已经腐朽了。

examples.english: a pile of rotten apples
examples.chinese: 一大堆烂苹果

examples.english: Bees will often build their nests in decayed wood.
examples.chinese: 蜜蜂经常在腐朽的木头里筑巢。

examples.english: Sixty years ago, the average 4 year old had 7 decayed or missing teeth.
examples.chinese: 60年前，四岁大的儿童平均每人有七颗蛀蚀或落掉的牙齿。

examples.english: Even the stonework on the old house was decayed and crumbling.
examples.chinese: 甚至这幢老房子的石造部分也已破败崩落了。

examples.english: The girl's decomposed body had been in the water for a long time.
examples.chinese: 女孩腐烂的尸体在水中已很长时间了。

examples.english: Coal is the partially decomposed remains of forests that covered the earth millions of years ago.
examples.chinese: 煤是由几百万年前覆盖地球表面的森林半腐烂形成的。

examples.english: Both men's bodies were badly decomposed.
examples.chinese: 那两名男子的尸体都已严重腐烂了。

examples.english: All there was in the fridge was a piece of mouldy cheese and some tomatoes.
examples.chinese: 冰箱里所有的东西就是一块发霉的乳酪和几个番茄。

examples.english: The cupboards were damp and full of moldy old clothes.
examples.chinese: 衣柜很潮湿，全是些发霉的旧衣服。

examples.english: This pizza's so old it's gone mouldy!
examples.chinese: 这块比萨饼放得太久，都发霉了！

examples.english: A rusty old car had been abandoned at the side of the road.
examples.chinese: 路边有一辆被丢弃的生锈的旧车。

examples.english: I opened the rusty iron gate and walked up the path.
examples.chinese: 我打开了生锈的旧铁门，沿着小道走过去。

examples.english: The bicycle looked a bit rusty, but it worked.
examples.chinese: 这辆自行车看起来有点生锈，但能骑。

examples.english: You must remove all traces of rust before repainting the windows.
examples.chinese: 重新油漆窗户之前先得把所有锈迹都擦掉。

examples.english: You should never use leaking or corroded batteries.
examples.chinese: 切不可使用漏液或已腐坏的电池。

examples.english: Badly corroded metal gutters and downpipes should be replaced by the plastic type.
examples.chinese: 锈损严重的金属排水沟和下水管应该换成塑料的。

centers.english: to make something decay

examples.english: Bedtime drinks aimed at helping children to sleep may be rotting their teeth.
examples.chinese: 为帮助儿童入睡而给他们喝的睡前饮料可能会蛀蚀牙齿。

examples.english: If you leave any water in the bottom of the boat, it'll slowly rot it away.
examples.chinese: 如果在船舱底留了水，慢慢地船就会烂掉的。

examples.english: Acid can corrode most metals.
examples.chinese: 酸会腐蚀大多数金属。

examples.english: Over the years, rain, wind, and sun had corroded the statue, turning the bronze a bright green.
examples.chinese: 这些年来，雨水、风吹和日晒已经侵蚀了这尊塑像，把青铜变成了草绿色。

examples.english: That chemical is highly corrosive, so be careful.
examples.chinese: 那种化学品腐蚀性很强，所以要小心。

centers.english: the process of decaying

examples.english: Tiny organisms that live in the soil assist the process of decay.
examples.chinese: 生活在土壤中的微生物加快了腐化过程。

examples.english: Brushing your teeth regularly helps to fight against tooth decay.
examples.chinese: 按时刷牙有助防止蛀牙。

examples.english: The crash happened as a result of corrosion to the airplane's fuselage.
examples.chinese: 这架飞机失事是因为机身受到了腐蚀。

centers.english: to not die in spite of an accident, illness, or war
centers.chinese: 在事故、疾病或战争中挺过来没有死

examples.english: Only 12 of the 140 passengers on the plane survived.
examples.chinese: 机上140名乘客中只有12人幸存。

examples.english: Doctors predicted that the baby would not survive with such severe disabilities.
examples.chinese: 医生预计，这个婴儿有这么严重的缺陷是活不下来的。

examples.english: My grandmother wouldn't survive another operation.
examples.chinese: 我祖母不能再经受另一次的手术了。

examples.english: Not many of the insects survive the winter.
examples.chinese: 能熬过冬天的昆虫不多。

examples.english: Chemical pollution is threatening the survival of many species of wildlife.
examples.chinese: 化学污染威胁着许多野生物种的生存。

examples.english: So far rescue workers have found no sign of any survivors.
examples.chinese: 营救人员至今仍未发现有任何幸存者的迹象。

examples.english: Survivors of the accident were rushed to the nearest hospital.
examples.chinese: 事故幸存者被急速送往最近的医院。

examples.english: An eight-month-old baby girl was the sole survivor of a car crash that killed both her parents.
examples.chinese: 一名八个月大的女婴在一场车祸中父母双亡，她是唯一的幸存者。

examples.english: They managed to stay alive by eating roots and berries.
examples.chinese: 他们靠吃草根和浆果设法活了下来。

examples.english: We had to ignore the terrible things going on around us, and just concentrate on staying alive.
examples.chinese: 我们只得不去理会周围发生的那些可怕的事情，只顾保命。

examples.english: I was so ill that the doctors weren't sure if I was going to pull through.
examples.chinese: 我当时病得非常厉害，医生都没有把握我能不能挺过来。

examples.english: The first few days after the accident were awful, and everyone was just praying he'd pull through.
examples.chinese: 事故发生后的头几天情况非常糟糕，大家都在祈祷，希望他能挺过去。

examples.english: The driver was killed but his passenger escaped with only a few scratches.
examples.chinese: 司机死了，但他的乘客却死里逃生，只有几处擦伤。

examples.english: The family escaped injury when a fire gutted their two-bedroom apartment.
examples.chinese: 一场火灾烧光了这家人的有两个卧室的公寓，所幸他们逃脱了，没有受伤。

examples.english: The prime minister narrowly escaped a terrorist bomb in 1999.
examples.chinese: 首相在1999年恐怖分子炸弹袭击中侥幸躲过一劫。

examples.english: The fireman said they'd had a very lucky escape.
examples.chinese: 消防员说他们能逃出来非常走运。

examples.english: One of the victims has severe burns and is not expected to live.
examples.chinese: 其中一名受害者被严重烧伤，估计性命难保。

examples.english: Our baby was in the intensive care unit, and we didn't know whether she would live or die.
examples.chinese: 我们的宝宝在特别护理病房，不知道她是否能活下来。

expressions.text: live to tell the tale/live to tell about it

examples.english: There were ten in the lifeboat, but only three lived to tell the tale.
examples.chinese: 救生船上有十个人，但只有三人活下来讲述了他们的经历。

examples.english: At one point I was so exhausted and weak that I didn't think I was going to make it.
examples.chinese: 有一会我精疲力竭，虚弱无力，都以为自己捱不过来了。

examples.english: I was surprised she had made it through the night.
examples.chinese: 我很吃惊，她居然挺过了这一晚上。

examples.english: His breathing was getting worse and he was not expected to last the night.
examples.chinese: 他的呼吸越来越弱，估计熬不过这个晚上。

examples.english: It's amazing that she's managed to last this long, really.
examples.chinese: 她终究坚持了这么长时间，真是想不到。

centers.english: when something continues to exist in spite of difficulties
centers.chinese: 某事物虽有困难但仍继续存在

examples.english: Many of the small, independent businesses are struggling to survive.
examples.chinese: 许多独立的小公司在挣扎求存。

examples.english: Only a few of Leonardo's earlier paintings still survive.
examples.chinese: 达·芬奇的早期画作只有少数几幅得以保存下来。

examples.english: Our friendship has survived the bad times and has grown stronger.
examples.chinese: 我们的友谊经受了考验，变得更加坚固了。

examples.english: The Cathedral survived repeated bombings during the Second World War.
examples.chinese: 这座教堂在第二次世界大战期间经历了多次轰炸，但是仍然保存了下来。

examples.english: The survival of the president's plans to cut taxes remains in doubt.
examples.chinese: 总统的减税计划能否推行下去仍是个疑问。

examples.english: The museum possesses the only surviving manuscript of Cicero's letters.
examples.chinese: 这家博物馆藏有西塞罗存留至今的唯一书信手稿。

examples.english: If we can come through this crisis, the company's future looks bright.
examples.chinese: 如果我们能渡过这次危机，公司将会有光明的前途。

examples.english: The German team were in deep trouble at the beginning of the match but in the end they came through.
examples.chinese: 德国队在比赛开始时困难重重，但最后他们安然渡过了。

examples.english: Ever since we started the business two years ago, we've been struggling to stay afloat.
examples.chinese: 我们自两年前创业以来，一直艰难地维持着。

centers.english: to continue to live your normal life in spite of problems
centers.chinese: 虽然有问题，但仍继续过正常的生活

examples.english: The program provides homeless kids with the basics they need to survive: food, shelter, and health care.
examples.chinese: 这个计划为无家可归的孩子提供吃、住和医疗保健等生存的基本需要。

examples.english: Liz Taylor has survived several broken marriages, as well as periods of drug and alcohol addiction.
examples.chinese: 利兹·泰勒经历了好几次失败的婚姻，又多次吸毒、酗酒，但都挺过来了。

examples.english: I don't think I could survive another year as a teacher. It's just too stressful.
examples.chinese: 再当一年老师我想我是挺不过去了，压力实在太大。

examples.english: As more is revealed, the audience begins to see Wendy as a survivor rather than a victim.
examples.chinese: 观众知道得越来越多以后，渐渐地开始认为温迪是一个善于在困境中生存的人，而不是一个可怜的受害者。

examples.english: Although she's had an extremely hard life, Tina Turner is a born survivor.
examples.chinese: 蒂娜·特纳虽然生活不幸，但她似乎生来就是一个生活的强者。

examples.english: She's had problems before and she's always come through.
examples.chinese: 她以前也有过困难，但总安然渡过。

examples.english: Some children come through their parents’ divorcing better than others.
examples.chinese: 面对父母离异，有的孩子能坚强承受下来，有的孩子就不行。

examples.english: It was not an easy time for Tracy but her friends helped her get through.
examples.chinese: 那段时间对特蕾茜来说很不容易，但她的朋友帮助她熬过来了。

examples.english: ‘Oh Jane, how will I ever get through this?’ she said, and the tears started flowing again.
examples.chinese: “噢，简，我怎么熬过这一关呢？”她说着，眼泪又开始流下来了。

centers.english: to continue to live a normal life even though you have very little money
centers.chinese: 虽然钱不多，但仍继续过正常的生活

examples.english: When I look at how much we spend on food, I wonder how unemployed people are able to survive.
examples.chinese: 我看到我们在食物方面要花这么多钱，不知道失业的人是怎么维持生活的。

expressions.text: survive on £100 a week/a small income etc

examples.english: It's really difficult to survive on £120 a week in London.
examples.chinese: 在伦敦一个星期靠120英镑是很难维持生活的。

examples.english: I don't know how they expect me to survive on my salary.
examples.chinese: 我不知道他们认为靠我的工资我可以如何生活。

examples.english: We don't have a lot of money to spend on luxuries, but we get by.
examples.chinese: 我们没有很多的钱去买奢侈品，但生活还是过得去的。

expressions.text: get by on $5 a day/a small income etc

examples.english: When I was at college I used to be able to get by on $20 a week.
examples.chinese: 我读大学时一周20美元就能过日子了。

examples.english: How much do you need to live on?
examples.chinese: 你需要多少生活费？

examples.english: $35,000 a year sounds like a lot of money, but it's scarcely enough to live on in New York.
examples.chinese: 一年35,000美元听起来像是很多钱，但在纽约靠这点钱维持生活根本不够。

examples.english: Old people on pensions are finding it hard to make ends meet.
examples.chinese: 靠养老金生活的老人觉得日子过得很拮据。

examples.english: My mother had to work 12 hours a day in a factory just to make ends meet.
examples.chinese: 我母亲得在工厂里一天干12小时，这样才能勉强维持生计。

examples.english: I'm just a pensioner, trying to keep my head above water.
examples.chinese: 我就领一点养老金勉强度日。

examples.english: Schools throughout the county are struggling to keep their heads above water.
examples.chinese: 全县的学校都在挣扎求存。

examples.english: They subsist on eggs and beans most of the time.
examples.chinese: 他们大多数时候都靠鸡蛋和豆子为生。

expressions.text: subsist on a dollar a day/a small income etc

examples.english: The workers are expected to subsist on a dollar a day.
examples.chinese: 工人们只有靠一天一美元的收入勉强度日。

examples.english: They live just above subsistence level the lowest amount they need to live.
examples.chinese: 他们正好在最低生活水平线以上过活。

examples.english: She eked out a living by selling firewood.
examples.chinese: 她靠卖柴勉强度日。

examples.english: Farmers eked out a primitive existence on the dry, stony land.
examples.chinese: 农民们在多石的旱地上过着原始的生活，勉强维持生计。

centers.english: not dead

examples.english: Are all your grandparents still alive?
examples.chinese: 你的祖父母、外祖父母都还健在吗?

examples.english: Paramedics fought for an hour by the roadside to keep him alive.
examples.chinese: 医护人员在路边奋力抢救了他一个小时。

examples.english: The police found them lying on the kitchen floor. Mr Wilkins was dead and his wife was barely alive.
examples.chinese: 警方发现他们倒在厨房的地板上，威尔金斯先生已经死亡，他的太太也已奄奄一息。

examples.english: The children were found alive and well after being missing for several days.
examples.chinese: 孩子们失踪多天以后，被找到时安然无恙。

examples.english: She was the last person to see him alive.
examples.chinese: 她是最后一个见到他还活着的人。

examples.english: A brother in Australia is Mary's only living relative.
examples.chinese: 在澳大利亚的一个兄弟是玛丽唯一还在世的亲人。

examples.english: Seamus Heaney is Ireland's greatest living poet.
examples.chinese: 谢默斯·希尼是爱尔兰在世的最伟大的诗人。

examples.english: At this age, children are still unable to distinguish between animate and inanimate objects.
examples.chinese: 这个年龄的儿童还不能分辨有生命和无生命的物体。

examples.english: Do you believe in life after death?
examples.chinese: 你相信人死后还有来生吗?

examples.english: Unfortunately it's usually the worst experiences that remind us how precious life is.
examples.chinese: 遗憾的是，往往总是最不幸的经历才使我们想起生命是何等宝贵。

examples.english: She sat beside the hospital bed, holding his hand as he struggled for life.
examples.chinese: 当他在死亡边缘挣扎时，她坐在病床旁边，握着他的手。

examples.english: An 18-year-old San José man clung to life late Wednesday after being shot in the head during a robbery.
examples.chinese: 星期三晚上，一名18岁的圣何塞青年因为在一起抢劫事件中头部中枪而奋力与死神搏斗。

centers.english: to continue to be alive

examples.english: The baby was born with a serious heart defect and not expected to live.
examples.chinese: 这个婴儿生下来心脏就有严重缺陷，没有存活的希望。

expressions.text: live for two years/three months/a long time etc

examples.english: My father only lived for a few years after his heart attack.
examples.chinese: 我父亲心脏病发作之后只活了几年时间。

examples.english: Cats normally live for about twelve years.
examples.chinese: 猫一般能活12年左右。

examples.english: The will to live can be a vital factor in recovery.
examples.chinese: 求生的意志有时是康复的一个极重要因素。

examples.english: The ship's crew eventually resorted to eating rats and even sawdust to stay alive.
examples.chinese: 船员们最后不得不靠吃老鼠乃至锯木屑活命。

examples.english: Krasner, who has cancer, vowed she would stay alive until her brother was set free.
examples.chinese: 身患癌症的克拉斯纳发誓一定要活到弟弟获释的那一天。

examples.english: Judith outlived two of her three children.
examples.chinese: 朱迪丝比她三个孩子中的两个活得长。

expressions.text: outlive somebody by 10 years/six months etc

examples.english: Women, on average, outlive men by 1.9 years.
examples.chinese: 女性平均比男性长寿1.9年。

expressions.text: survive somebody by 10 years/six months etc

examples.english: Charles survived his wife by three months.
examples.chinese: 查尔斯比妻子多活了三个月。

examples.english: Monroe is survived by his wife, Regina, and two sons, Stanley and John.
examples.chinese: 门罗没有他的妻子雷吉娜活得长，也没有他两个儿子斯坦利和约翰长寿。

centers.english: something that is alive

examples.english: An ocean is full of living things.
examples.chinese: 海洋里充满了各种生物。

examples.english: The tree, at 368 feet, is considered the world's tallest living thing.
examples.chinese: 这棵368英尺高的树被认为是世界上最高的生物。

examples.english: Ecology is the study of how living things relate to their environment.
examples.chinese: 生态学是研究生物与环境之间相互关系的学科。

examples.english: Hobart is convinced that there are life forms on other planets.
examples.chinese: 霍巴特确信其他星球上也有生物存在。

examples.english: Some scientists estimate that at least one third of the life forms that exist in deep oceans have not yet been discovered.
examples.chinese: 有些科学家估计，深海中至少有三分之一的生物尚未被发现。

examples.english: strange life forms in the Galapagos Islands
examples.chinese: 加拉帕戈斯群岛上的珍稀生物

examples.english: Food poisoning is caused by a bacterial organism.
examples.chinese: 食物中毒是由细菌引起的。

examples.english: Genetic engineers manipulate living organisms such as cells or bacteria to create products which fight disease.
examples.chinese: 遗传工程学家利用细胞、细菌等生物有机体制造抗击疾病的产品。

examples.english: Oxygen is necessary to sustain life on Earth.
examples.chinese: 氧气是维持地球上的生命所必需的。

examples.english: The new evidence seemed to indicate that life existed on Mars billions of years ago.
examples.chinese: 这些新的证据似乎表示，火星几十亿年前就有生命存在了。

examples.english: Many species of plant life continue to be eradicated in South American rain forests.
examples.chinese: 南美热带雨林的许多植物种类在不断消失。

examples.english: The Sea of Cortez is rich with wildlife.
examples.chinese: 科特斯海有丰富的野生动植物。

examples.english: The organization was set up to protect wildlife across Europe.
examples.chinese: 这个组织是为了保护欧洲的野生动植物而成立的。

centers.english: something that is not living and never has been living
centers.chinese: 现在和从前都没有生命的东西

examples.english: How can you get angry with a car? It's an inanimate object!
examples.chinese: 你怎么对汽车发火？它是个没有生命的物体！

examples.english: Some languages categorise not only living things as masculine or feminine, but inanimate objects as well.
examples.chinese: 有些语言中不仅把有生命的物体分为阳性和阴性，无生命的物体也有如此分类。

centers.english: no longer alive

examples.english: She's no longer breathing - I think she's dead.
examples.chinese: 她不再呼吸了——我想她已死了。

examples.english: The dead man's wife was questioned by police.
examples.chinese: 那名死者的妻子受到警察的审问。

examples.english: The doctor told him that unless he stopped drinking he would be dead within a year.
examples.chinese: 医生告诉他，如果他不戒酒就活不过一年。

examples.english: It was autumn, and the path was covered in dead leaves.
examples.chinese: 秋天，路上落满了枯叶。

examples.english: These flowers look dead - shall I throw them away?
examples.chinese: 这些花看样子已经枯萎了—我把它们扔掉好吗？

examples.english: Following the shoot-out six people were dead and three were wounded.
examples.chinese: 枪战过后，有六人死亡三人受伤。

examples.english: One of the gunshot victims was pronounced dead on arrival at City Hospital.
examples.chinese: 枪击事件的其中一名受害者送达市立医院时被宣布已死亡。

examples.english: She set up the fund in memory of her late husband.
examples.chinese: 她为了纪念已故的丈夫而成立了该基金。

expressions.text: the late President Marcos/John Lennon etc

examples.english: He is a big fan of reggae music and the late Bob Marley.
examples.chinese: 他是雷盖音乐和已故的鲍勃·马利的狂热崇拜者。

examples.english: By the time we found him he was stone-dead.
examples.chinese: 我们发现他时，他已经完全断气了。

examples.english: Tom poked the bird with a stick. ‘Yeah, it's as dead as a doornail.’
examples.chinese: 汤姆用树枝捅了捅那只鸟，“是的，它确实死了。”

examples.english: He took the dead girl's hand. It felt cold and lifeless.
examples.chinese: 他握住了死去女孩的手。那手摸上去冰冷僵硬，毫无生气。

examples.english: The men found Dunlap's lifeless body slumped in the front seat of his car.
examples.chinese: 那些人发现邓拉普僵死的身体瘫在他汽车的前座上。

examples.english: a religious service to commemorate the dead of two World Wars
examples.chinese: 为纪念两次世界大战中的死难者而举行的宗教仪式

examples.english: Four of the dead had been travelling in the same car.
examples.chinese: 四名死者同乘一辆车旅行。

examples.english: Ordinary Americans are beginning the heart-breaking task of counting their dead.
examples.chinese: 美国的平民开始了统计死难者人数这令人心碎的工作。

examples.english: The deceased died from an overdose of diet pills.
examples.chinese: 该死者是死于过量服用减肥丸。

examples.english: The President was an old friend of her deceased father, Dr. Bernstein.
examples.chinese: 总统是她已故的父亲伯恩斯坦博士的老朋友。

examples.english: Bentley's relatives are demanding a posthumous pardon from the government.
examples.chinese: 本特利的亲属要求政府准予死后特赦。

examples.english: She was posthumously awarded the Queen's medal for bravery.
examples.chinese: 她因勇敢死后被追授女王奖章。

examples.english: He talks about spending his parents’ money as if they were already pushing up daisies.
examples.chinese: 他讲起花父母钱的口气，好像他父母已经进棺材了似的。

centers.english: the time when someone is alive

expressions.text: the happiest/saddest/worst etc day of your life

examples.english: The day our daughter was born was the happiest day of my life.
examples.chinese: 我们女儿出生的那天是我一生中最快乐的一天。

examples.english: Sutcliffe was sent to jail for the rest of his life.
examples.chinese: 萨克利夫被关进监狱囚禁终生。

examples.english: Dad spent his life building up this business.
examples.chinese: 爸爸一生都在开发这生意。

examples.english: How would you like to spend your life? What kind of work would you like to do?
examples.chinese: 你希望你的一生怎么过？你想做什么样的工作？

examples.english: The accident left him crippled for life.
examples.chinese: 这场事故使他终生残疾。

examples.english: He knew very little about his mother's early life in Africa.
examples.chinese: 他对母亲早年在非洲的生活所知甚少。

examples.english: The first half of my adult life was spent in jail.
examples.chinese: 我成年后前半段的时间是在狱中度过的。

examples.english: Lack of calcium can lead to bone disease in later life.
examples.chinese: 缺钙会导致晚年骨骼上的疾病。

examples.english: He suffered a lot of pain in his short lifetime.
examples.chinese: 他在短暂的一生中遭遇的痛苦很多。

examples.english: During Dickinson's lifetime, only a few of her works were actually published.
examples.chinese: 迪金森生前只有很少的作品发表。

examples.english: The National Medal of Arts award is meant to honor a lifetime of achievement.
examples.chinese: 国家艺术奖章是表扬一个人终生的成就。

examples.english: A good tool should last a lifetime.
examples.chinese: 好的工具可以用上一辈子。

examples.english: The visit to Tibet was a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.
examples.chinese: 这次去西藏是一次千载难逢的机会。

examples.english: I asked Debbie about her student days and she just laughed. ‘I dropped out of school the day I turned 16,’ she said.
examples.chinese: 我问起了黛比学生时代的事她就大笑。她说：“我刚过16岁就辍学了。”

examples.english: In her younger days, she was quite a fancy dresser.
examples.chinese: 她年轻时候穿得很时髦。

examples.english: The play is based on the early days of cabaret singer Rosie Kincaid.
examples.chinese: 这出戏是根据卡巴莱歌星罗茜·金凯德的早年生涯改编的。

examples.english: Evelyn spent the rest of her days quietly in the country until her death in 1963.
examples.chinese: 伊夫琳在这个国家平静地度过余生，直至1963年去世。

examples.english: She ended her days in poverty.
examples.chinese: 她在穷困潦倒中度过余生。

examples.english: Michael knew Annette during her days as an off-Broadway actress.
examples.chinese: 迈克尔是在安妮特当外百老汇演员时认识她的。

examples.english: I first became a fan of guitarist Cory Weldon during his days with the Leeds band, Sinister Minister.
examples.chinese: 我第一次迷上吉他手科里·韦尔登，是他在利兹“邪恶的大臣”乐队的时候。

examples.english: The natural lifespan of a pig is 10-12 years.
examples.chinese: 猪的平均寿命是10到12年。

examples.english: Saltwater fish have a shorter lifespan in the aquarium.
examples.chinese: 咸水鱼养在水族箱里会缩短寿命。

examples.english: Authorities estimate that smoking trims between 12 and 15 years off a person's lifespan.
examples.chinese: 专家估计，吸烟会使一个人的寿命缩短12到15年。

examples.english: Women have a longer life expectancy than men.
examples.chinese: 女性的预期寿命比男性长。

examples.english: Life expectancy was much lower then than it is now.
examples.chinese: 那时候人类的预期寿命比现在短多了。

examples.english: At the beginning of the century, the average life expectancy for Americans was less than 50 years.
examples.chinese: 本世纪初，美国人的平均预期寿命不足50岁。

expressions.text: have a life expectancy of 64/78 etc years

examples.english: British males now have a life expectancy of around 77 years.
examples.chinese: 英国男性现在的平均预期寿命为77岁左右。

examples.english: Despite decades of study, the life cycle of the tiny shellfish, krill, is still something of a mystery.
examples.chinese: 尽管研究了几十年，磷虾这种微小的甲壳类动物的生命周期仍然是一个谜。

centers.english: the kind of life that someone has

examples.english: Having a baby completely changes your life.
examples.chinese: 生了宝宝会完全改变你的生活。

examples.english: Debbie has a really busy life, doesn't she?
examples.chinese: 黛比的生活真忙，是吗？?

examples.english: They enjoyed a full and happy life together until his death in June l999.
examples.chinese: 他们在一起过着充实幸福的生活，直到他于1999年6月去世。

examples.english: We've led a very quiet life since Ralph retired.
examples.chinese: 拉尔夫退休以后，我们过着非常平静的生活。

examples.english: By our actions today, we can improve the quality of life for future generations.
examples.chinese: 我们可以通过我们今天的行动，来提高我们子孙后代的生活质量。

examples.english: Immigrating to the UK was their only chance for a better life.
examples.chinese: 移民到英国是他们改善生活的唯一机会。

examples.english: He left school at 15, quickly turning to a life of crime.
examples.chinese: 他15岁辍学，不久就过着犯罪的生涯。

examples.english: Elena faced a lonely existence in the big city.
examples.chinese: 埃琳娜在大城市里生活很寂寞。

examples.english: The workers lived a miserable existence and were treated like serfs.
examples.chinese: 工人们过着悲惨的生活，受到农奴般的对待。

examples.english: You really need to think about leading a healthier lifestyle.
examples.chinese: 你真的需要考虑一下，过一种更健康的生活。

examples.english: Hurst's lavish lifestyle is the stuff of legend.
examples.chinese: 赫斯特的奢华生活成了传奇故事的题材。

examples.english: Even when in debt, he continued to enjoy an extravagant lifestyle.
examples.chinese: 即使有债务缠身，他还是继续过着奢侈的生活。

examples.english: ‘How can we abandon our way of life?’ asked the old sheep herder. ‘It's all we know.’
examples.chinese: “我们又怎能放弃我们的生活方式呢？”那位老牧羊人问道，“我们就只知道这些。”

examples.english: Casual dress has become a way of life in corporate Britain.
examples.chinese: 在英国这个组成国家，穿便装已经成了一种生活方式。

expressions.text: the British/German/American etc way of life

examples.english: Shopping is an important part of the American way of life.
examples.chinese: 购物是美国人生活方式的一个重要部分。

examples.english: Tom and Linda both earn good salaries -- they live well and have a nice home.
examples.chinese: 汤姆和琳达两人的薪水都很高——他们生活舒适，有一所漂亮的住房。

examples.english: One can live cheaply in London, although it's not easy.
examples.chinese: 在伦敦不用花很多钱也可以生活，但是很不容易。

centers.english: continuing for all of someone's life

examples.english: I've known Jenny all my life.
examples.chinese: 我认识珍妮一辈子了。

examples.english: Despite having worked hard all his life, Jimmy had saved very little for retirement.
examples.chinese: 吉米尽管一生都在努力工作，但是退休养老的钱还是没攒下多少。

examples.english: There's no such thing as a job for life these days.
examples.chinese: 如今已经没有一份工作干一辈子这种事情了。

examples.english: As far as I'm concerned, when you get married it's for life.
examples.chinese: 对我来说，结了婚，那就是一辈子的事情了。

examples.english: My father was a lifelong supporter of the Democrats.
examples.chinese: 我父亲毕生支持民主党。

examples.english: It was her lifelong ambition to write a best-selling novel.
examples.chinese: 写一部畅销小说是她毕生的理想。

examples.english: The two remained lifelong friends.
examples.chinese: 那两人终生为友。

centers.english: plants/animals/places/substances

examples.english: It was fascinating to see the elephants in their natural environment.
examples.chinese: 看到大象在自然的环境中生活，真是有趣。

examples.english: The river had worn away the rock to form a natural bridge.
examples.chinese: 河水冲蚀岩石，形成一座天然的桥。

examples.english: A pipeline carries natural gas from under the sea to the refinery inland.
examples.chinese: 管道把海底的天然气输送到内陆的提炼厂。

examples.english: Zaire is a country with substantial natural resources.
examples.chinese: 美国是一个自然资源丰富的国家。

examples.english: Is your hair naturally curly do you do anything to it to make it curly?
examples.chinese: 你的头发是天生鬈曲的吗？

examples.english: There were lots of wild flowers growing by the roadside.
examples.chinese: 路边长了许多野花。

examples.english: Wild strawberries are much smaller than the kind you get in shops.
examples.chinese: 野生草莓比商店里的草莓小很多。

examples.english: In my opinion, wild animals should not be kept in zoos.
examples.chinese: 我认为，野生动物不应该饲养在动物园里。

examples.english: The island has an abundance of wildlife - animals, birds and fish.
examples.chinese: 岛上野生生物品种丰富，有各种动物、鸟和鱼。

examples.english: Banana trees were growing wild on the edge of the forest.
examples.chinese: 森林边缘有野生的香蕉树。

examples.english: There are only about 5000 white rhino left living in the wild.
examples.chinese: 处于野生状态的白犀牛只剩下5000头左右了。

examples.english: Ghana still imports both raw and processed tobacco.
examples.chinese: 加纳仍旧进口生烟草和加工过的烟草。

examples.english: The Princess was wearing a dark green dress made of raw silk.
examples.chinese: 王妃穿了一件墨绿色的生丝礼服。

examples.english: Japan depends on the outside world for virtually all of its raw materials, including oil.
examples.chinese: 日本几乎所有的原材料，包括石油，都依赖外国提供。

examples.english: Here we find immense virgin forests, similar to those of the Amazon and Indonesia.
examples.chinese: 我们在这里发现了大片类似亚马孙地区和印度尼西亚的原始森林。

examples.english: In front of them were 500 miles of virgin plains almost uninhabited by white people.
examples.chinese: 在他们眼前，是连绵500英里的原始平原，几乎没有白人居住。

examples.english: Untamed horses roamed free in the wilds of the American plains.
examples.chinese: 野马在美国的荒野上自由自在地漫步。

examples.english: These were the first railways, the first means of crossing wide open spaces that are still vast and untamed, even today.
examples.chinese: 这些是最早的铁路，荒漠的土地上最早的交通工具，而这些土地甚至在今天依然广袤如初，荒无人烟。

examples.english: With its largely unspoiled natural beauty, Vietnam is rapidly becoming a destination for more and more foreign visitors.
examples.chinese: 越南有很多未被破坏的自然美景，很快就成了越来越多外国游客的目的地。

examples.english: The path leads eventually to a vast expanse of unspoilt woodland.
examples.chinese: 这条小路最终通向一片广袤的原始林地。

examples.english: If you go further into the countryside, you will come across a number of unspoilt medieval walled villages.
examples.chinese: 如果你再深入这片乡村地区，会看到一些尚未遭受破坏的中世纪带城墙的村落。

centers.english: food/drink

examples.english: The manufacturers claim that only natural ingredients are used in their products.
examples.chinese: 制造商称他们的产品中只用天然原料。

examples.english: Today's consumers prefer drinks that contain natural flavourings.
examples.chinese: 现在的消费者喜欢喝含天然调味香料的饮品。

examples.english: Most supermarkets now sell organic produce.
examples.chinese: 现在大多数超级市场都出售有机农产品。

examples.english: Organic fruit is generally more expensive.
examples.chinese: 有机水果通常较昂贵。

examples.english: Nowadays I only buy meat that is organic.
examples.chinese: 现在我只买有机肉类。

examples.english: pure orange juice
examples.chinese: 纯橙汁

examples.english: Our burgers are made of 100% pure beef.
examples.chinese: 我们的汉堡包用100%的纯牛肉做成。

centers.english: to kill someone

examples.english: He claims that he didn't mean to kill his wife.
examples.chinese: 他声称自己不是故意要杀死妻子的。

examples.english: The police believe the man may kill again.
examples.chinese: 警方相信那男子还会杀人。

examples.english: What the hell were you doing! You could have killed me!
examples.chinese: 你在搞什么鬼！你差点把我害死！

examples.english: Official sources say that 20 people were killed in last night's air raids.
examples.chinese: 官方消息指昨晚的空袭中有20人死亡。

examples.english: My sixteen-year-old son Louis was killed by a drunk driver two years ago.
examples.chinese: 我那16岁的儿子路易斯两年前被一个喝醉酒的司机撞死了。

examples.english: Wilson is accused of murdering his daughter and her boyfriend.
examples.chinese: 威尔逊被控杀死了自己的女儿和其男友。

examples.english: One of the country's top judges has been murdered by the Mafia.
examples.chinese: 该国最优秀的法官之一被黑手党谋杀了。

examples.english: President Lincoln was assassinated by John Wilkes Booth.
examples.chinese: 林肯总统是被约翰·威尔克斯·布思刺杀的。

examples.english: an attempt to assassinate the Pope
examples.chinese: 刺杀教皇的企图

examples.english: The assassination of Indira Gandhi caused a crisis in India.
examples.chinese: 英迪拉·甘地被刺杀在印度引发了一场危机。

examples.english: The court heard how the man was beaten to death by racist thugs.
examples.chinese: 法庭听取了这名男子被种族主义暴徒打死的经过。

examples.english: A social worker was found stabbed to death in her office last night.
examples.chinese: 一名社会工作者昨晚被发现在办公室内被人捅死。

examples.english: Smith had apparently been kicked to death.
examples.chinese: 史密斯显然是被踢死的。

examples.english: He believed that somebody was trying to poison him.
examples.chinese: 他相信有人想要毒死他。

examples.english: She had already poisoned three members of her own family with arsenic.
examples.chinese: 她已经用砒霜毒杀了家中三名成员。

examples.english: He accused his brother of trying to drown him.
examples.chinese: 他指责他哥哥试图淹死他。

examples.english: Police said that the victim had been strangled.
examples.chinese: 警方说被害人是被勒死的。

examples.english: He slid his hands around her neck and tried to strangle her.
examples.chinese: 他悄悄地把双手移到她脖子上想扼死她。

examples.english: He kept marrying rich women and then bumping them off.
examples.chinese: 他接二连三地娶有钱的女人然后再将她们杀死。

examples.english: His uncle decided to have him bumped off.
examples.chinese: 他叔叔决心将他干掉。

examples.english: Perhaps his wife had taken the opportunity to do away with her rival.
examples.chinese: 也许他妻子利用了这个机会来除掉情敌。

centers.english: the act or crime of killing someone

examples.english: New York paid tribute to the thousands of innocent people murdered on September 11th.
examples.chinese: 纽约市民向在911事件中数千名遇难的无辜民众表示悼念。

examples.english: a series of brutal murders
examples.chinese: 一连串残暴的凶杀案

examples.english: The incidence of violent crimes -- murder, rape, and assault -- has increased in inner city areas.
examples.chinese: 凶杀、强奸、袭击等暴力罪行的发生率在市中心地区上升了。

examples.english: Ronny Jones was found guilty of the murder of a 15 year old girl.
examples.chinese: 罗尼·琼斯被控杀害了一名15岁女孩，罪名成立。

examples.english: The gun was found five miles from where the murder was committed.
examples.chinese: 枪是在离凶杀案现场5英里远的地方发现的。

examples.english: He was charged with attempted murder and found guilty.
examples.chinese: 他被控企图谋杀，罪名成立。

examples.english: The murder victim has not yet been identified.
examples.chinese: 这起谋杀案的受害者身份尚未确认。

examples.english: 70 per cent of homicides take place within the family.
examples.chinese: 70%的凶杀案是在家中发生的。

examples.english: As yet no evidence has been found to suggest that this death was homicide.
examples.chinese: 目前尚未找到证据说明该死亡事件是蓄意杀人。

examples.english: A newspaper article criticized his handling of a homicide case
examples.chinese: 报纸上有一篇文章批评了他对一起谋杀案的处理手法。

examples.english: She denied murdering her husband, but pleaded guilty to manslaughter.
examples.chinese: 她否认谋杀了丈夫，但承认是误杀。

examples.english: The court decided there was insufficient evidence for a manslaughter charge.
examples.chinese: 法庭裁定证据不足，没法证明这是过失杀人。

examples.english: The driver of the train was charged with the manslaughter of 13 people.
examples.chinese: 火车司机被控误杀罪，致使13人丧生。

examples.english: A terrorist group has claimed responsibility for the killing.
examples.chinese: 一个恐怖主义组织声称对这起谋杀负责。

examples.english: The defendant claimed that he was only avenging the killing of his brother.
examples.chinese: 被告称他只是为弟弟遇害而进行报复。

examples.english: Perry said Taylor approached him and asked him to carry out a contract killing on Johnson.
examples.chinese: 佩里说泰勒与他接洽，要雇他杀死约翰逊。

examples.english: Three foreign diplomats have been killed in a series of assassinations.
examples.chinese: 三名外国外交官在一连串刺杀事件中遇害。

examples.english: The assassination of Franz Ferdinand of Austria in Sarajevo led to the First World War.
examples.chinese: 奥地利弗朗兹·斐迪南大公在萨拉热窝遇刺，引发了第一次世界大战。

examples.english: Flowers were laid to commemorate the anniversary of the assassination of John Lennon.
examples.chinese: 人们在约翰·列侬遇刺周年纪念日摆放鲜花悼念他。

examples.english: There was no question of foul play - a suicide note was found near the body.
examples.chinese: 不可能是谋杀—尸体旁边发现了一张自杀字条。

examples.english: The medical report showed no signs of poison in the body but the police still suspect foul play.
examples.chinese: 化验报告显示体内并无任何毒药迹象，但警方仍怀疑这是谋杀。

centers.english: to kill a large number of people

examples.english: Thousands of the rebels were killed in a gun battle with government troops.
examples.chinese: 在与政府军的一次枪战中，有成千上万的叛军被杀。

examples.english: The gunman killed 22 people and wounded 15, before turning his gun on himself.
examples.chinese: 持枪歹徒枪杀了22人、伤了15人，之后饮弹自尽。

examples.english: They have massacred hundreds of innocent people.
examples.chinese: 他们屠杀了几百名无辜的平民。

examples.english: Claims by refugees that 1000 people had been massacred were denied by the local authorities.
examples.chinese: 难民声称有1,000人遭屠杀的说法被地方当局否认。

examples.english: Men ran through the village burning houses and slaughtering the inhabitants.
examples.chinese: 那些人冲进村子，烧毁房子，屠杀村民。

examples.english: Men, women and children were slaughtered in groups by their captors.
examples.chinese: 男人、女人和儿童一批一批地遭到劫持者杀戮。

examples.english: There was an attempt to exterminate ethnic groups in the north of the country.
examples.chinese: 有人企图要将该国北方的族群斩尽杀绝。

examples.english: In Tasmania there was total extermination of the aboriginal population.
examples.chinese: 在塔斯马尼亚，土著居民被统统杀绝了。

centers.english: when a large number of people are killed

examples.english: The soldiers who carried out the massacre have not been identified.
examples.chinese: 那些实施大屠杀的士兵还未被指认出来。

examples.english: The students claimed the two men had ordered the massacre of 200 people in Kwangju.
examples.chinese: 学生声称是这两个人下令在光州屠杀200人的。

examples.english: The slaughter was terrible - the whole field was covered with bodies.
examples.chinese: 这场屠杀非常可怕—遍地陈尸。

examples.english: Many are determined to avenge the slaughter in the World Trade Center and the Pentagon.
examples.chinese: 许多人决心要为发生在世贸中心和五角大楼的大屠杀复仇。

examples.english: His war crimes included the deliberate slaughter of 250,000 individuals.
examples.chinese: 他的战争罪行包括屠杀了25万人。

examples.english: The war was over. The carnage had ceased.
examples.chinese: 战争结束，大屠杀停止了。

examples.english: The foreign minister has asked ambassadors from several states to help end the carnage.
examples.chinese: 外交部长要求几个国家的大使协助结束这场大屠杀。

examples.english: Details are still emerging of this, the biggest mass murder in Canadian history.
examples.chinese: 这桩加拿大历史上最大规模的屠杀事件的细节逐步曝光。

examples.english: the mass murder of innocent people
examples.chinese: 对无辜平民的大屠杀

examples.english: What is going on is not just war, it is genocide.
examples.chinese: 正在发生的不只是战争，而且是种族大屠杀。

examples.english: In recent history, the existence of prejudice has led to violence and genocide.
examples.chinese: 近代历史上，由于偏见的存在导致了暴力事件和种族灭绝。

centers.english: to kill yourself

examples.english: He killed himself by jumping under a train.
examples.chinese: 他跳到火车底下自杀身亡。

examples.english: She tried to kill herself when news of the scandal leaked out.
examples.chinese: 丑闻传出后，她试图自杀。

examples.english: You'll kill yourself if you go on drinking like that.
examples.chinese: 你再这样喝酒的话会送命的。

examples.english: Police are treating the man's death as suicide.
examples.chinese: 警方把这名男子的死列为自杀案处理。

examples.english: There is grave concern about the number of teenage suicides recorded last year.
examples.chinese: 去年记录的青少年自杀数字引起了人们的极大关注。

examples.english: Barry threatened to commit suicide if she refused to marry him.
examples.chinese: 巴里威胁说如果她拒绝嫁给他，他就要自杀。

examples.english: Stephen required hospital treatment after his suicide attempt.
examples.chinese: 史蒂芬自杀未遂，需要入院治疗。

examples.english: Many religions consider that it is a sin to take your own life.
examples.chinese: 许多宗教都认为自杀是一种罪。

examples.english: Desperately frustrated and alone, she could see no way out except to take her own life.
examples.chinese: 因为极度的失意和孤单，她只有以自杀寻求解脱。

examples.english: The thought of having to stay in the house all day made me feel almost suicidal.
examples.chinese: 想到要整天待在屋内使我差一点要自杀。

examples.english: Had the prisoner previously displayed suicidal tendencies?
examples.chinese: 该囚犯以前有过自杀倾向吗？

examples.english: Sometimes I feel so low I just feel like ending it all.
examples.chinese: 有时我情绪非常低落，觉得不如一了百了。

centers.english: someone who kills another person

examples.english: Do you think the police will ever catch her murderer?
examples.chinese: 你认为警察会抓到谋杀她的人吗？

examples.english: A convicted murderer was on the run last night after escaping from Lewes prison.
examples.chinese: 一名已定罪的杀人犯昨晚从刘易斯监狱逃脱后仍在躲避追捕。

examples.english: In prison he enjoyed reading biographies of other mass murderers.
examples.chinese: 在监狱里他爱读有关其他杀人如麻的刽子手的传记。

examples.english: The victim's best friend, Joanne, is convinced the killer is local.
examples.chinese: 受害人最要好的朋友乔安妮确信凶手是本地人。

examples.english: The judge described him as ‘a cold-blooded killer’.
examples.chinese: 法官称他是“冷血杀手”。

examples.english: Police are searching for the killer of a 9 year old boy.
examples.chinese: 警方正在追寻那个杀害了一名9岁男童的凶手。

examples.english: Dr Shipman is the biggest serial killer of all time.
examples.chinese: 希普曼医生是有史以来杀人最多的连环杀手。

examples.english: Although the assassins were never caught, it is commonly believed that they were working for the government.
examples.chinese: 虽然一直未能逮捕行刺者，但一般都认为他们是政府的人。

examples.english: His assassins must have been aware of his security arrangements.
examples.chinese: 刺杀他的人肯定知道他的保安措施。

examples.english: The hitman used the top floor room of a hotel opposite the square.
examples.chinese: 这名职业杀手利用了广场对面旅馆的顶层房间。

examples.english: The police believe the murder could be the work of a contract killer.
examples.chinese: 警方认为这宗谋杀是职业杀手所为。

examples.english: Dr Green said that, in his opinion, Perry was a dangerous psychopath who might kill again.
examples.chinese: 格林医生说，按他的看法，佩里是个危险的精神变态者，可能会再杀人。

centers.english: when someone is killed as a punishment

examples.english: King Charles I was executed on 30th January 1649.
examples.chinese: 国王查理一世于1649年1月30日被处死。

examples.english: The two young men spent 6 months in jail waiting to be executed.
examples.chinese: 这两个年轻人在监狱里过了六个月等待被处死。

examples.english: This is a backward and cruel society, in which people are executed for homosexuality and adultery.
examples.chinese: 这是个落后、残暴的社会，其人民会因同性恋和通奸被处死。

examples.english: No date has been set for her execution.
examples.chinese: 她的死刑执行日期未定。

examples.english: If his appeal fails, his last hope to avoid execution is the US Supreme Court.
examples.chinese: 假如他上诉失败，他免于死刑的最后希望就落在美国联邦最高法院了。

examples.english: The chief priests wanted to arrest Jesus and put him to death.
examples.chinese: 大祭司要逮捕耶稣并处死他。

examples.english: No woman had been put to death in the state since the American Revolution.
examples.chinese: 自美国独立战争以来，该州未有女性被处以死刑。

examples.english: The queen would have people put to death for her own amusement.
examples.chinese: 女王会为了自己取乐而把人处死。

examples.english: I don't believe bringing back capital punishment would reduce crime.
examples.chinese: 我不相信恢复死刑能够减少犯罪。

examples.english: Most people that we questioned were against capital punishment.
examples.chinese: 被我们访问的人中大部分都反对死刑。

examples.english: The death penalty does not exist in Britain.
examples.chinese: 英国没有死刑。

examples.english: Do you think they should bring back the death penalty?
examples.chinese: 你认为他们应该恢复死刑吗？

examples.english: Murder is one of the few offences that carries the death penalty.
examples.chinese: 谋杀是少数要判处死刑的罪行之一。

examples.english: He is the youngest person ever to be given a death sentence in San Diego County.
examples.chinese: 他是圣迭戈县历来最年轻的被判处死刑的人。

examples.english: Drug-smuggling is a capital offence in many countries.
examples.chinese: 在许多国家走私毒品是死罪。

examples.english: Larson has been on death row since 1995 for murdering a taxi driver.
examples.chinese: 拉森谋杀了一名出租车司机，自1995年起就一直被关押在死囚区。

examples.english: The state allows no communication with a condemned man.
examples.chinese: 这个州不允许与被判死刑的人有联系。

examples.english: Here are the kitchens where the condemned prisoner's last meal was prepared.
examples.chinese: 这里是给死囚准备最后一餐的厨房。

centers.english: when someone is killed to stop them from suffering
centers.chinese: 将某人杀死以使其不再痛苦

examples.english: In the Netherlands euthanasia has already been legalized.
examples.chinese: 在荷兰，安乐死已经合法化了。〔

examples.english: Most doctors are opposed to euthanasia on ethical grounds.
examples.chinese: 出于道德原因，多数医生都反对安乐死。

examples.english: Some doctors carry out mercy killings by giving large quantities of pain-killing drugs.
examples.chinese: 有些医生以给病人服大量止痛药的方式来实行安乐死。

centers.english: to cause death

examples.english: A car drove onto the pavement, killing three of Mrs Maguire's children.
examples.chinese: 一辆汽车开到人行道上，夺去了马圭尔太太三个孩子的生命。

examples.english: The explosion killed 32 people.
examples.chinese: 这次爆炸使32人丧生。

examples.english: The disease has already killed more than 2000 in Latin America.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病在拉丁美洲已造成二千多人死亡。

examples.english: Many people do not realize that these drugs are dangerous and can kill.
examples.chinese: 许多人都没有意识到这些药物有危险，会导致死亡。

expressions.text: be killed in a crash/accident etc

examples.english: James Dean was killed in a car crash in 1955.
examples.chinese: 詹姆斯·迪安在1955年死于一次车祸。

examples.english: Rhubarb leaves, either raw or cooked, can cause violent stomach pains or even death.
examples.chinese: 大黄叶子，不管是生的还是煮熟了的，都会引起剧烈的腹痛，甚至会造成死亡。

examples.english: Research is being done into the virus that caused the death of 15,000 seals last summer.
examples.chinese: 人们正在对去年夏天造成15,000头海豹死亡的病毒进行研究。

examples.english: The injuries sustained by the victim were not sufficient to have caused death in a healthy person.
examples.chinese: 受害者所受的伤对一个健康的人来说不足以造成死亡。

examples.english: The cause of death was a broken neck.
examples.chinese: 死因是断了脖子。

examples.english: It was the cold winter of 1992 that finally killed off the last of the roses.
examples.chinese: 1992年的寒冬最终使最后一批玫瑰花被冻死了。

examples.english: Pollution in the lakes and streams has been killing off many species of fish.
examples.chinese: 湖泊溪流的污染使许多种鱼死亡。

examples.english: If you plant your seedlings out too soon, a late frost might kill them off.
examples.chinese: 如果你播种太早，晚霜可能会把它们冻死。

examples.english: A vast amount of the Amazonian rainforest is being destroyed every day.
examples.chinese: 大片的亚马孙雨林正日复一日地遭受破坏。

examples.english: Milk is heat treated for a few seconds to destroy bacteria.
examples.chinese: 牛奶经过几秒钟高温处理以消灭细菌。

examples.english: We should be discouraging the unnecessary destruction of any wild species.
examples.chinese: 我们应该阻止任何不必要的灭绝野生物种的行为。

examples.english: In those days measles was a major killer.
examples.chinese: 那时候麻疹是主要的致命疾病。

examples.english: Diphtheria is still a killer in many developing countries.
examples.chinese: 在许多发展中国家，白喉仍是一种致命疾病。

examples.english: The entire village was wiped out.
examples.chinese: 村里所有人被夺去了生命。

examples.english: Archaeologists think that massive floods could have wiped out the dinosaurs.
examples.chinese: 考古学家认为可能是大洪水使恐龙灭绝的。

examples.english: The fur trade has wiped leopards out in some areas.
examples.chinese: 毛皮贸易使一些地区的豹被杀光。

examples.english: Cambodia's 21-year war decimated the wildlife population.
examples.chinese: 柬埔寨长达21年的战争导致大批野生生物死亡。

examples.english: His prize herd of cows has been decimated by an unknown disease.
examples.chinese: 一种不知名的疾病使他那群优质奶牛大量死亡。

examples.english: After the decimation of the rainforests, life on earth will be very different.
examples.chinese: 如果雨林遭到大规模破坏，地球上的生命将会非常不同。

centers.english: able to kill you

examples.english: He suffered a fatal injury to the neck.
examples.chinese: 他脖子上受到了致命伤。

examples.english: A sudden shock could be fatal to anyone with a weak heart.
examples.chinese: 对任何心脏功能弱的人来说，突然受惊吓可能会致命。

examples.english: The bank manager was fatally wounded during the robbery.
examples.chinese: 在这次抢劫案中，银行经理受了致命伤。

examples.english: The poison produced by the frog's skin is so lethal that it can paralyze a bird or a monkey immediately.
examples.chinese: 青蛙皮肤上产生的毒素非常致命，能立即使一只鸟或猴子瘫痪。

examples.english: A lethal cocktail of pollutants is being poured into Scotland's coastal waters, according to Greenpeace.
examples.chinese: 绿色和平组织称，一种会致命的混合污染物被倒进苏格兰的沿海水域。

examples.english: Almost any sharp or pointed object can potentially be a lethal weapon.
examples.chinese: 几乎任何锋利的或尖的物体都有可能成为致命武器。

examples.english: Most pesticides are lethal to earthworms on or near the surface.
examples.chinese: 大部分杀虫剂对地上或近地面的蚯蚓都是致命的。

examples.english: In the First World War pneumonia was as deadly as bullets and shells.
examples.chinese: 第一次世界大战时，肺炎跟枪炮一样致命。

examples.english: Some mushrooms are edible while others, which look almost identical, contain deadly poisons.
examples.chinese: 有些蘑菇可以食用，而另一些虽然看上去几乎一模一样，却含有致命的毒素。

examples.english: A swarm of killer bees has attacked 70 children in a village in northern Mexico.
examples.chinese: 在墨西哥北部的一个村庄里，一大群杀人蜂袭击了70名儿童。

examples.english: Killer floods and hurricanes in Asia have destroyed whole towns.
examples.chinese: 亚洲致命的洪水和飓风把一个一个小镇彻底摧毁。

examples.english: He killed Leonardo and received a mortal wound himself.
examples.chinese: 他杀了莱奥纳多，自己也受了致命伤。

examples.english: He gathered all his strength to deliver his opponent the final mortal blow.
examples.chinese: 他聚集全身力量给了对手最后致命的一击。

examples.english: Wolfe and his opponent Montcalm were both mortally wounded in the battle.
examples.chinese: 沃尔夫和他的对手蒙特卡姆都在战斗中受了致命伤。

centers.english: to kill an animal

examples.english: Is it morally acceptable to kill animals for food?
examples.chinese: 把动物杀了吃在道德上是可以接受的吗？

examples.english: You shouldn't really kill spiders, even if you're frightened of them.
examples.chinese: 即使你怕蜘蛛也不应该把它们打死。

examples.english: They were so hungry they killed the rest of their livestock that winter.
examples.chinese: 那年冬天他们饿极了，就把余下的牲畜全部宰杀了。

examples.english: The only way to stop the virus spreading is by slaughtering all infected animals.
examples.chinese: 制止这种病毒扩散的唯一办法是把所有受感染的牲口都宰了。

examples.english: As part of the ceremony a cow was slaughtered and placed on the stone altar.
examples.chinese: 作为仪式的一部分，他们宰杀了一头奶牛，并将其置于石砌的祭坛上。

examples.english: Most of the cattle will be sent for slaughter.
examples.chinese: 大部分牛都将被送去屠宰。

examples.english: The Animal Disease Authority decided to destroy the cattle that were infected with the disease.
examples.chinese: 动物疾病管理局决定把感染这种疾病的牛杀了。

examples.english: The court ordered the owner of the rottweilers to have the dogs destroyed.
examples.chinese: 法庭命令这几头罗威纳犬的主人把它们人道毁灭。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb/verb phrase usually in passive

examples.english: When our old cat became very sick we had to ask the vet to put her down.
