examples.chinese: 她当高级应召女郎，一个晚上挣5,000美元。

examples.english: There were rent boys as young as twelve or thirteen waiting outside the bars.
examples.chinese: 酒吧外面有才十二三岁的男妓在等候。

examples.english: Criminal gangs control all the drugs, gambling and prostitution in the city.
examples.chinese: 犯罪团伙控制了该市所有的毒品交易、赌博和卖淫活动。

examples.english: Most of these girls give up prostitution when they're about 30 and settle down and marry.
examples.chinese: 这些女子大多数都在30岁左右弃娼从良，安定下来结婚嫁人。

examples.english: Women can become so desperate for money that they turn to prostitution.
examples.chinese: 女人有时会求财心切而去卖身。

examples.english: We're dealing with a professional escort, not some dumb whore.
examples.chinese: 我们要应付的是一名职业交际花，而不是什么愚蠢的娼妇。

centers.english: to attack or harm someone in a sexual way
centers.chinese: 在性方面袭击或伤害某人

examples.english: He was accused of raping his ex-girlfriend.
examples.chinese: 他被指控强奸前女友。

examples.english: The woman was raped and then murdered by her kidnapper.
examples.chinese: 那名女子被绑架者先奸后杀。

examples.english: Rapists and child sex offenders are kept separate from other prisoners.
examples.chinese: 强奸犯和儿童性侵犯者跟其他犯人分开关押。

examples.english: It was not the first time he had been accused of rape.
examples.chinese: 这不是他第一次被指控犯强奸罪了。

examples.english: Rape victims receive special counselling and are treated very sensitively.
examples.chinese: 强奸案的受害者接受特殊心理辅导，并需要小心处理。

examples.english: A woman's sexual history should not be introduced in a rape trial.
examples.chinese: 审理强奸案的时候不应该公开一个女人的性爱历史。

examples.english: He had been sexually abusing his daughter since she was eleven years old.
examples.chinese: 女儿11岁起他就对她进行性虐待。

examples.english: The police are investigating claims of child abuse.
examples.chinese: 警方正在调查儿童被性侵犯的指控。

examples.english: None of the children showed signs of sexual abuse.
examples.chinese: 这些儿童都没有受到过性虐待的迹象。

examples.english: Her father had molested her and her sisters when they were children.
examples.chinese: 她父亲在她和妹妹还小的时候对她们进行过性骚扰。

examples.english: He has not seen his child since the allegations of child-molesting were made.
examples.chinese: 他自从被指控有猥亵儿童的行为之后，就再也没有见到过自己的孩子。

examples.english: Victims of sexual harassment are often afraid to report it in case they lose their jobs.
examples.chinese: 性骚扰受害者经常不敢上报，怕失去工作。

examples.english: She successfully prosecuted her boss for sexual harassment.
examples.chinese: 她以性骚扰为理由成功起诉她的老板。

centers.english: books, films, or pictures that are about sex
centers.chinese: 涉及性的书籍、电影或图片等

examples.english: It is now clear that there is a link between pornography and sex crimes.
examples.chinese: 现在人们清楚，色情作品和性犯罪之间是有联系的。

examples.english: Two trucks full of hard-core pornography were seized by customs officials today.
examples.chinese: 今天有满满两卡车的露骨色情作品被海关官员收缴了。

examples.english: a back-street movie theater showing hard-porn movies
examples.chinese: 放映黄色影片的一家后街电影院

examples.english: 81 per cent of our readers said they regularly watched soft-porn movies.
examples.chinese: 我们的读者当中，有81%的人说他们会经常看一些略带色情的电影。

examples.english: He admitted possessing nude photographs, but denied they were pornographic.
examples.chinese: 他承认拥有一些裸照，但否认是色情的。

examples.english: She was offered $50,000 to pose for a pornographic magazine.
examples.chinese: 有人出50,000美元叫她给一本色情杂志拍照。

examples.english: He wrote both poetry and erotic literature.
examples.chinese: 他写诗歌，也写色情作品。

examples.english: A number of scenes in the film were very erotic.
examples.chinese: 这部电影有些镜头很色情。

examples.english: Adult magazines in shops must be kept where children cannot see them.
examples.chinese: 店里的成人杂志必须放在儿童看不见的地方。

examples.english: The movie contains some pretty steamy scenes!
examples.chinese: 这部电影有些情色镜头很过火！

examples.english: His latest production is a steamy thriller set in Hong Kong.
examples.chinese: 他最近的一部作品是以香港为背景的色情淫荡片。

examples.english: Bette Midler came up with a typically raunchy performance that delighted the audience.
examples.chinese: 贝特·米德勒作了一次大胆狂放的表演，令观众大为开怀。

centers.english: books, jokes, remarks etc that are about sex and are offensive
centers.chinese: 淫秽的书籍、笑话、言语等

examples.english: ‘Lady Chatterley's Lover’ was banned as an obscene book.
examples.chinese: 《查特莱夫人的情人》曾作为淫书被禁。

examples.english: He was charged with smuggling obscene materials into the UK.
examples.chinese: 他被指控走私淫秽材料进入英国。

examples.english: They just sit around telling dirty jokes - it's very boring.
examples.chinese: 他们就坐着讲一些黄色的笑话—非常无聊。

examples.english: He used to keep a collection of dirty books hidden under his bed.
examples.chinese: 他以前有一批黄色书籍藏在床底下。

examples.english: You can't wear that dress to the dinner party -- it's positively indecent!
examples.chinese: 你不可以穿那种衣服出席晚宴—实在太不雅观了！

examples.english: Models were forced into all sorts of indecent poses for the camera.
examples.chinese: 模特儿们被迫在镜头面前摆出各种各样有伤风化的姿势。

examples.english: ‘Say no more!’ he grinned, giving her a lewd wink.
examples.chinese: “别说了！”他咧嘴笑着朝她眨眨眼，目光猥亵。

examples.english: Although his jokes were a little lewd, he always made us laugh.
examples.chinese: 虽然他的笑话有点下流，但是总能让我们发笑。

examples.english: I found the kids watching a blue movie on the video last night.
examples.chinese: 我发现孩子们昨晚在看一部黄色电影的录像。

examples.english: Her jokes are too blue for most audiences.
examples.chinese: 她的笑话对大多数听众来说都太黄色了。

examples.english: The magazine printed filthy pictures that shocked everyone.
examples.chinese: 该杂志上刊登了一些令人震惊的淫秽图片。

examples.english: He occasionally tells an off-color joke, but his image is practically that of a saint.
examples.chinese: 他偶尔也会讲讲黄色笑话，但他的形象几乎是圣洁的。

examples.english: There's too much violence and smut on TV these days.
examples.chinese: 如今电视上暴力和色情太多了。

centers.english: books, jokes, remarks etc that are about sex in an amusing way
centers.chinese: 关于性的有趣书籍、笑话、言语等

examples.english: Those jokes are a bit risqué -- don't tell them in front of your grandparents.
examples.chinese: 这些笑话有点不太正经，别在你祖父母面前讲。

examples.english: Edgar kept us entertained with a stream of unusual and rather saucy stories.
examples.chinese: 埃德加讲了一连串的故事，都很离奇，还带点黄色，逗得我们很开心。

examples.english: When she worked in the pub, men used to make suggestive remarks to her all the time.
examples.chinese: 她在酒吧工作的时候，总是有男人对她说挑逗性的话。

examples.english: The film "Tom Jones’ is famous for its sexually suggestive eating scene.
examples.chinese: 影片《汤姆·琼斯》中的那个挑逗性的用餐镜头很出名。

examples.english: The programme consists of an hour of sexist banter and innuendo.
examples.chinese: 节目中有一小时都是讲一些带有性别歧视意味的笑话和挑逗性的话语。

examples.english: She found his relentless sexual innuendoes irritating.
examples.chinese: 她觉得他那些没完没了的挑逗话语很讨厌。

examples.english: I don't want to hear any more of your rude jokes, Damien -- shut up.
examples.chinese: 我不想再听你那些下流的笑话了，达米安，闭嘴吧。

examples.english: If you are going to tell the children some of your stories make sure they aren't too rude.
examples.chinese: 如果你想给孩子们讲一些你的故事，你要确保不能太粗俗。

examples.english: Dennis sat on his bed reading a naughty magazine.
examples.chinese: 丹尼斯坐在床上看一本不太正经的杂志。

examples.english: They were reading an American novel that seemed to have had all the naughty bits cut out.
examples.chinese: 他们在看一本美国的小说，小说里凡是不正经的地方好像都被删去了。

centers.english: when someone talks about sex in an offensive way
centers.chinese: 某人以具冒犯性的方式谈论性

examples.english: The comedian wasn't funny at all; he was just crude and offensive.
examples.chinese: 这个喜剧演员一点也不滑稽，只是粗俗下流。

examples.english: She was worried that her husband's crude remarks might have upset some of the guests.
examples.chinese: 她担心丈夫的粗话可能得罪了一些客人。

examples.english: She tried to ignore his coarse jokes and crude innuendoes -- he was obviously drunk.
examples.chinese: 她尽量不去理会他那些粗俗的笑话和挑逗的话语，他显然是喝醉了。

examples.english: He ruined the evening with his vulgar talk about women and about how much he could drink.
examples.chinese: 他鄙俗地大谈女人，吹嘘自己的酒量，破坏了这个晚上的气氛。

centers.english: young

examples.english: You're too young to smoke.
examples.chinese: 你年纪太小，不能吸烟。

examples.english: a single mother with two young children
examples.chinese: 带着两个年幼孩子的单身妈妈

examples.english: When I was younger, I used to play a lot of baseball.
examples.chinese: 我年轻时常常打棒球。

examples.english: Her youngest son works for a television company.
examples.chinese: 她最小的儿子在一家电视公司上班。

examples.english: At 35, he is the youngest person to hold this office.
examples.chinese: 他35岁，是担任这一职位最年轻的人。

examples.english: When I was little we used to go camping a lot.
examples.chinese: 我小时候，我们常常去露营。

examples.english: There were three bridesmaids at the wedding, and even the little one behaved beautifully.
examples.chinese: 婚礼上有三个女傧相，甚至连年纪最小的一个都举止优雅。

examples.english: They've been married for ten years and have two little girls.
examples.chinese: 他们结婚十年，有两个小女孩。

examples.english: Who's that little boy in the blue sweater?
examples.chinese: 那个穿蓝色毛衣的小男孩是谁？

examples.english: We loved going to the zoo when we were small.
examples.chinese: 小时候我们喜欢去动物园。

examples.english: The kids were too small to really understand.
examples.chinese: 孩子们太小了，不能真正理解。

examples.english: She soon discovered that looking after small children was very tiring.
examples.chinese: 她很快发现，照看年幼的孩子很累人。

centers.english: younger than someone else

examples.english: At school, the younger children go home an hour before the rest.
examples.chinese: 在学校里，年纪较小的孩子比其他孩子早一小时回家。

examples.english: He is the most influential of the younger French photographers.
examples.chinese: 他是法国年轻摄影师中最具影响力的人。

expressions.text: ten years/18 months etc somebody's junior

examples.english: Sarah is six years my junior.
examples.chinese: 萨拉比我小六岁。

examples.english: He was replaced by a young graduate, 10 years his junior.
examples.chinese: 取代他的是一个比他小十岁的年轻大学毕业生。

centers.english: a brother or sister who is younger than you

examples.english: Tony's the oldest - he has two younger sisters.
examples.chinese: 托尼最大—一他有两个妹妹。

examples.english: The king was killed by his younger brother.
examples.chinese: 国王被他的弟弟所杀。

examples.english: Mike's little brother is doing much better at school than he is.
examples.chinese: 迈克的小弟弟在学校里的表现比他好多了。

examples.english: She went to the ballet class with her little sister every week.
examples.chinese: 她每星期都和她的小妹妹一起去上芭蕾课。

examples.english: He has a kid sister in the fourth grade at school.
examples.chinese: 他有个念四年级的小妹妹。

examples.english: I suddenly realized Bobby was more than just an annoying kid brother who always wanted to use my stuff.
examples.chinese: 我突然意识到，博比不再只是老想用我东西的烦人小弟弟。

centers.english: a young person

examples.english: River Phoenix became a famous actor while still a teenager.
examples.chinese: 里弗·菲尼克斯十几岁时就成了著名演员。

examples.english: The survey shows that four out of five teenagers have experimented with illegal drugs.
examples.chinese: 调查显示，五个青少年中有四个尝试过吸毒。

examples.english: Jenny has three teenage children.
examples.chinese: 珍妮有三个十几岁的孩子。

examples.english: One of the youths pushed her against the wall and took her bag.
examples.chinese: 其中一个小伙子把她往墙上一推，夺走了她的手提包。

examples.english: The police had questioned three youths, but then later released them without charge.
examples.chinese: 警方盘问了三名男青年，但后来把他们无罪释放了。

examples.english: a gang of youths on motorbikes
examples.chinese: 一帮骑摩托车的青年男子

examples.english: She had run away from home several times in her teens.
examples.chinese: 她十几岁的时候几次离家出走。

examples.english: Most of the girls at the concert were in their early teens.
examples.chinese: 来听音乐会的女孩子大多是十三四岁。

examples.english: John changed from a friendly and cheerful young boy into a confused adolescent.
examples.chinese: 约翰从一个友好、乐观的小男孩变成了迷茫的少年。

examples.english: An estimated 62 million Americans smoke, including 4.1 million adolescents aged 12-17.
examples.chinese: 估计有6，200万名美国人吸烟，其中包括410万名12至17岁的青少年。

examples.english: Parents tend to worry more about adolescent daughters than adolescent sons.
examples.chinese: 对于青春期的孩子，父母一般担心女儿比担心儿子更多。

examples.english: Stores are forbidden to sell alcohol and cigarettes to minors.
examples.chinese: 商店禁止向未成年人出售烟酒。

centers.english: young people in general

examples.english: The show is extremely popular, especially with the young.
examples.chinese: 这个节目极受欢迎，尤其是年轻人爱看。

examples.english: Living together without getting married is increasingly common among the young.
examples.chinese: 未婚同居在年轻人中越来越普遍了。

examples.english: The youth of today have much more money than we had 50 years ago.
examples.chinese: 今天的年轻人比我们50年前有钱多了。

examples.english: The youth of industrialized nations need to be made aware of global problems.
examples.chinese: 有必要使工业化国家的年轻人意识到全球面临的问题。

centers.english: the time when you were young

examples.english: Nina had happy memories of her childhood on the farm.
examples.chinese: 尼娜对于在农场上度过的童年有着美好的回忆。

examples.english: His early childhood was spent with his father in Chicago.
examples.chinese: 他的幼儿时期是与父亲在芝加哥度过的。

examples.english: My own childhood hero was Stirling Moss, the racing car driver.
examples.chinese: 我童年时的偶像是赛车手斯特林·莫斯。

examples.english: The smell of the sea brought back childhood memories of long summer holidays spent on the beach.
examples.chinese: 大海的气息勾起了童年的回忆，让人记起了在沙滩上度过的悠长暑假。

examples.english: She revisited all the places where she had spent her youth.
examples.chinese: 她重游了年轻时常到的每一个地方。

examples.english: Caroline had been a ballet dancer in her youth.
examples.chinese: 卡罗琳年轻时是个芭蕾舞演员。

examples.english: During adolescence, boys are sometimes very shy and lacking in self-confidence.
examples.chinese: 青春期的时候，男孩子有时很害羞，而且缺乏自信。

centers.english: affecting or involving young people

examples.english: I met her at the local youth club.
examples.chinese: 我在当地一家青年俱乐部认识了她。

examples.english: a concert by the National Youth Orchestra
examples.chinese: 由国家青年管弦乐团演奏的音乐会

examples.english: the teenage music scene
examples.chinese: 青少年音乐圈子

examples.english: There has been a significant increase in teenage pregnancies recently.
examples.chinese: 最近青少年怀孕人数大幅上升。

examples.english: Juvenile crime is an increasing problem in big cities.
examples.chinese: 少年犯罪是大城市里日趋严重的问题。

examples.english: Many juvenile offenders were being put in adult prisons.
examples.chinese: 许多少年犯被关押在成人监狱里。

examples.english: The public housing units have frequently become slums and hotbeds of crime, especially juvenile delinquency.
examples.chinese: 公共住房单位经常成为贫民窟和犯罪温床，尤其是少年犯罪。

examples.english: O'Brien, 15, will face murder charges in a juvenile court.
examples.chinese: 奥布赖恩，15岁，将在少年法庭面临谋杀罪指控。

examples.english: the treatment of juveniles in the criminal justice system
examples.chinese: 刑事审判制度中对少年犯的处理

centers.english: looking or behaving like a young person
centers.chinese: 外表或举止像年轻人的

examples.english: At 61, she seems remarkably youthful.
examples.chinese: 她61岁，看上去非常年轻。

examples.english: Although middle-aged, he had a youthful appearance.
examples.chinese: 虽然已人到中年，他的样子仍很年轻。

examples.english: She still manages to bring a youthful enthusiasm and energy to her work.
examples.chinese: 她对工作仍有青年人的热忱和活力。

examples.english: Veronique looks very young for her age, and people often think that her daughter is her sister.
examples.chinese: 韦罗妮克看上去比实际年纪年轻得多，人们常以为她女儿是她妹妹。

examples.english: Some people might think that she was ‘mutton dressed as lamb’, but tonight Moira really didn't care.
examples.chinese: 有些人可能认为莫伊拉是“老来俏”，但是今晚她才不在乎呢。

centers.english: school

examples.english: My mother is a teacher at the local school.
examples.chinese: 我母亲是本地学校的老师。

examples.english: The nearest school was 10 miles away.
examples.chinese: 最近的学校有十英里远。

examples.english: I always liked school, but my sister hated it.
examples.chinese: 我一向喜欢上学，可是姐姐讨厌上学。

examples.english: All the kids around here take the bus to school.
examples.chinese: 这附近所有的孩子都乘公共汽车上学。

examples.english: She must be about 16 - she's still at school.
examples.chinese: 她肯定是16岁左右，她还在上学嘛。

examples.english: Kyle is one of the most popular boys in school.
examples.chinese: 凯尔是学校里最受欢迎的男孩之一。

examples.english: I've only been out of school a couple of years, but I've forgotten all the math I learned.
examples.chinese: 我离开学校不过几年时间，可是以前学的数学全都忘了。

examples.english: Jessica's still too young to go to school.
examples.chinese: 杰茜卡上学还是太小了。

examples.english: Jake dropped out of school and started working at the bowling alley.
examples.chinese: 杰克退了学，开始在保龄球场打工。

examples.english: Teachers are complaining that the public schools do not receive adequate funding.
examples.chinese: 老师们抱怨公立学校得不到足够的经费。

examples.english: Many parents want to send their children to private school because class sizes are smaller.
examples.chinese: 许多父母都想送孩子上私立学校，因为私立学校班级人数较少。

examples.english: He argued for the abolition of the public schools, which he says are elitist.
examples.chinese: 他辩称应该取消公学，认为那是精英教育。

examples.english: The children were all wearing school uniforms.
examples.chinese: 孩子们都穿着校服。

centers.english: schools for very young children

examples.english: Ian will soon be old enough to go to nursery school.
examples.chinese: 伊恩很快就要到上幼儿园的年龄了。

examples.english: Eastin is calling for a plan to provide free preschool for all 4-year-olds.
examples.chinese: 伊斯廷正呼吁制定一个计划，为所有四岁的儿童提供免费的学前教育。

examples.english: The educational program is aimed at preschoolers.
examples.chinese: 这个教育方案是针对学龄前儿童的。

examples.english: Katie was one of the few children who could read when she started kindergarten.
examples.chinese: 凯蒂是少数几个上学前班的时候就会认字的孩子之一。

examples.english: Mrs. Marks was my kindergarten teacher.
examples.chinese: 马克斯太太是我上学前班时候的老师。

examples.english: The kindergartners were making pictures with construction paper.
examples.chinese: 学前班的小朋友正在用美工纸拼图。

centers.english: schools for children between the ages of about 5 and 12

examples.english: My father entered primary school in 1958.
examples.chinese: 我父亲是在1958年上小学的。

examples.english: Primary school children know more today than we did at that age.
examples.chinese: 现在的小学生比我们在他们这个年龄的时候懂得多。

examples.english: In grade school, Karen sang in the school chorus.
examples.chinese: 卡伦上小学的时候参加了学校合唱队。

examples.english: The senator met with a group of elementary school students learning about how government works.
examples.chinese: 参议员接见了一群正在学习政府运作方式的小学生。

centers.english: schools for older children

examples.english: Everyone in his family had at least completed secondary school.
examples.chinese: 他家里每个人都至少读完了中学。

examples.english: As children enter secondary school, parents often do not have the necessary knowledge to help with homework.
examples.chinese: 孩子进入中学以后，家长往往没有足够的知识辅导他们做家庭作业。

examples.english: Kim attends Byrd Middle School in Sun Valley.
examples.chinese: 金在太阳谷的伯德中学上学。

examples.english: The arts and crafts fair is geared toward middle school students.
examples.chinese: 这场手工艺展销会是为初中学生而设的。

examples.english: I started taking French in junior high school.
examples.chinese: 我念初中的时候开始学法语。

examples.english: Drug use among junior high school students has fallen.
examples.chinese: 初中学生吸毒的情况已经减少了。

examples.english: Brad was the captain of his high school football team.
examples.chinese: 布拉德上高中时是学校足球队的队长。

examples.english: The program requires high school students to take at least one college-level course.
examples.chinese: 这个计划要求高中学生至少上一门大学水平的课程。

examples.english: Where do you go to high school?
examples.chinese: 你在哪里上高中？

examples.english: He's been working full time since graduating from high school last June.
examples.chinese: 去年6月份高中毕业以后，他就全职工作了。

centers.english: a place where people over 18 can study
centers.chinese: 供18岁以上人士读书的地方

examples.english: the University of Chicago
examples.chinese: 芝加哥大学

examples.english: In 1986 32% of Saudi Arabian university professors were women.
examples.chinese: 1986年沙特阿拉伯有32%的大学教授为女性。

examples.english: She wants to go to university to study biology.
examples.chinese: 她想上大学读生物学。

examples.english: Both my sisters are at university.
examples.chinese: 我的两个姐姐都在上大学。

examples.english: The grant money is for low-income college students.
examples.chinese: 这助学金是给低收入家庭的大学生的。

examples.english: My brother never went to college, but he still has a very good job.
examples.chinese: 我哥哥从未上过大学，但他还是有一份非常好的工作。

examples.english: Our youngest daughter is in college now.
examples.chinese: 我们最小的女儿现在已经上大学了。

examples.english: We hadn't seen each other since we graduated from college.
examples.chinese: 我们大学毕业以后就再也没见过面了。

examples.english: Many college graduates are unable to find work in their field.
examples.chinese: 许多大学毕业生都找不到和自己专业有关的工作。

examples.english: Phil gave up his job, and he's going back to school next year.
examples.chinese: 菲尔辞掉了工作，打算明年回去读大学。

examples.english: My father always wanted me to go to law school.
examples.chinese: 我父亲一直想让我上法学院。

examples.english: Harvard Business School
examples.chinese: 哈佛商学院

examples.english: He's applied to all the best medical schools in the country.
examples.chinese: 他向国内所有最好的医学院都提出了申请。

examples.english: Eighty-five percent of high school students in the program go on to post-secondary education.
examples.chinese: 这个计划中有85%的高中学生继续接受中学后的教育。

examples.english: post-secondary institutions
examples.chinese: 中学后教育机构

examples.english: She got a degree in history last year, and now she's doing a postgraduate course.
examples.chinese: 她去年获得了历史学学位，现在在读研究生课程。

examples.english: postgraduate research
examples.chinese: 研究生的研究工作

examples.english: We met when we were both graduate students at Berkeley.
examples.chinese: 我们是一起在伯克利读研究生的时候认识的。

examples.english: The U.S. community college system is the largest system of higher education in the world.
examples.chinese: 美国的社区大学教育体系是世界上规模最大的高等教育体系。

examples.english: More women than ever are going on to higher education.
examples.chinese: 现在女子接受高等教育的情况比以往任何时候都多。

examples.english: The government needs to do more to fund adult education for the unemployed.
examples.chinese: 政府需要作出更大努力，资助失业人士接受成人教育。

centers.english: one of the periods into which the year is divided at school, university etc
centers.chinese: 学校、大学等的一个学期、学年等

examples.english: As a graduate student, he spent a term at Wichita State University.
examples.chinese: 他读研究生的时候，在威奇托州立大学度过了一个学期。

examples.english: The main exams are at the end of the summer term.
examples.chinese: 大考在夏季学期末举行。

examples.english: He attended Bennington College for three semesters.
examples.chinese: 他在贝宁顿大学读过三个学期。

examples.english: Fall semester starts the 28th of August.
examples.chinese: 秋季学期在8月28日开学。

examples.english: In Japan the school year starts in April and ends in February or March.
examples.chinese: 在日本，一学年从4月份开始，2月份或3月份结束。

examples.english: The end of the academic year with its final exams is very stressful for many students.
examples.chinese: 每学年结束的时候有期终考试，对许多学生来说都非常紧张。

examples.english: She was back in Michigan in time to teach spring quarter.
examples.chinese: 她及时回到密歇根教春季学期的课。

centers.english: what you get when you finish a course successfully
centers.chinese: 学完一门课程后获得的资格

examples.english: Everyone was given a diploma at the end of the course.
examples.chinese: 课程结束后，每个人都获发了证书。

examples.english: Anyone with a high school diploma can enroll in the course.
examples.chinese: 凡有高中文凭者均可报读这门课程。

examples.english: The two-year course leads to a teaching qualification.
examples.chinese: 修完这门为期两年的课程可以获得教学资格证书。

examples.english: List your qualifications in the space below.
examples.chinese: 在下面空白的地方列出你所有的资格证明。

examples.english: She left school at 16, with no academic qualifications.
examples.chinese: 她16岁辍学，没有任何学历证书。

examples.english: Cohn has a degree in political science from the University of Chicago.
examples.chinese: 科恩有芝加哥大学的政治学学位。

examples.english: Her dream is to get a degree in computer science and then get a high-paying job.
examples.chinese: 她的理想是拿到一个计算机科学的学位，再找一份高薪的工作。

examples.english: Maggie is doing a degree in psychology.
examples.chinese: 玛吉在攻读心理学学位。

examples.english: Getting a master's should help you get a better job.
examples.chinese: 读一个硕士学位应该可以帮助你找一份更好的工作。

examples.english: Successful applicants will have a master's degree in social work.
examples.chinese: 应聘者须持有社会工作专业的硕士学位。

examples.english: Bedell later earned a doctorate from Columbia University.
examples.chinese: 比德尔后来在哥伦比亚大学获得了博士学位。

examples.english: She had a PhD in industrial robotics.
examples.chinese: 她有工业机器人专业的博士学位。

centers.english: the process of studying and being taught

examples.english: The government should spend more on education.
examples.chinese: 政府在教育上应该投入更多的钱。

examples.english: My parents wanted me to have a good education.
examples.chinese: 我父母希望我受到良好的教育。

examples.english: Kerry hasn't decided if she'll continue her education or not.
examples.chinese: 克丽还没有决定好是否继续读书。

examples.english: All children in the state have a right to public education.
examples.chinese: 本州的所有儿童都有权接受公共教育。

examples.english: Many parents cannot afford private education for their children.
examples.chinese: 许多家长都负担不了让孩子接受私立教育。

examples.english: Different children have different educational needs.
examples.chinese: 不同的孩子在教育上有不同的需求。

examples.english: We offer a wide range of educational and sporting activities.
examples.chinese: 我们有各式各样的教育和体育活动。

examples.english: Many educational institutions have not been able make needed improvements because of funding cuts.
examples.chinese: 由于削减经费，许多教育机构都未能作出必要的改进。

examples.english: The American educational system is in need of reform.
examples.chinese: 美国的教育制度需要改革。

examples.english: Low-income children do not have the same educational opportunities as children from wealthier families.
examples.chinese: 低收入家庭的孩子没法和有钱人家的孩子享受同样的教育机会。

examples.english: Leon was unemployed, and had no academic qualifications.
examples.chinese: 利昂没有工作，也没有学历证书。

examples.english: Increased self-confidence can help improve academic achievement.
examples.chinese: 增强自信心有助于提高学习成绩。

examples.english: Her name is well known in academic circles.
examples.chinese: 她在学术界颇有名气。

examples.english: The new law raises concerns about academic freedom.
examples.chinese: 新法规提高了人们对学术自由的关注。

centers.english: a man

examples.english: There were two men and a woman in the car.
examples.chinese: 车中有两个男人和一个女人。

examples.english: He had a very successful business and died a rich man.
examples.chinese: 他有一家很兴隆的公司，他死的时候很有钱。

examples.english: You wouldn't understand how she feels -- you're a man!
examples.chinese: 你无法理解她的感受一你是个男的！

examples.english: Dave's a really nice guy.
examples.chinese: 戴夫这家伙真不错。

examples.english: Is he the guy who used to live next door to you?
examples.chinese: 他就是那个以前住在你家隔壁的人吗?

examples.english: That Simon seems like a decent bloke.
examples.chinese: 那个叫西蒙的看上去像个不错的家伙。

examples.english: He bought the car from a bloke at his office.
examples.chinese: 他从自己办公室里的一个人那儿买了这辆汽车。

examples.english: Can you serve this gentleman please, Sarah?
examples.chinese: 萨拉，请招待一下这位先生好吗？

examples.english: Mr Marks, an elderly gentleman, was travelling with his daughter.
examples.chinese: 马克斯先生，一位上了年纪的先生，在和他的女儿一起旅行。

examples.english: Ladies and gentlemen, may I present Dr Nelson Mandela.
examples.chinese: 女士们先生们，我们恭请纳尔逊·曼德拉博士。

examples.english: I won't be home until late -- I'm going out for a drink with the boys.
examples.chinese: 我很晚才回家—我要和伙伴们一起去喝酒。

examples.english: The lads played really well -- we were unlucky not to win the game.
examples.chinese: 伙伴们的表现非常出色—我们没赢得比赛很不走运。

examples.english: The film is a brilliant analysis of the typical American male.
examples.chinese: 影片对典型的美国男人作了精辟的分析。

examples.english: Haemophilia is a condition found only in males.
examples.chinese: 血友病是一种只在男性中发现的疾病。

examples.english: Most of the science teachers are male.
examples.chinese: 大部分自然科学教师都是男性。

examples.english: Salaries have increased for both male and female graduates.
examples.chinese: 男、女大学毕业生的薪水都增加了。

examples.english: The Health Service needs more male nurses.
examples.chinese: 公共医疗行业需要更多的男护士。

examples.english: I wouldn't say Tom was exactly a new man - he just enjoys looking after kids more than I do.
examples.chinese: 我觉得汤姆并不完全算得上是新派男人，他只不过是比我更喜欢照看孩子。

examples.english: He considered himself to be a New Man, sensitive about things such as PMS and bad hair days.
examples.chinese: 他认为自己是个新男性，对经前综合征以及情绪不佳这类情况很敏感。

centers.english: for men

examples.english: She was barefoot and wearing a man's shirt over her jeans.
examples.chinese: 她赤着双脚，穿了一件男式衬衫盖在牛仔裤上面。

examples.english: a shop selling handmade men's shoes
examples.chinese: 一家出售手工制作的男式鞋的商店

examples.english: More women are entering traditionally male jobs like engineering.
examples.chinese: 越来越多的女性投身于工程师这类传统的男性职业。

examples.english: male pursuits such as football and golf
examples.chinese: 像足球和高尔夫球这类男子的爱好

examples.english: For the first time women are being allowed into this previously all-male school.
examples.chinese: 女性首次被这所以前全是男生的学校录取。

examples.english: the male-only setting of the St Andrews Sporting Club
examples.chinese: 圣安德鲁斯体育俱乐部的纯男性环境

centers.english: typical of men

examples.english: He wanted to say he was sorry but his masculine pride wouldn't let him.
examples.chinese: 他想说抱歉，但是他的男性骄傲却不允许他说。

examples.english: Violence is an extreme form of traditionally masculine behaviour.
examples.chinese: 暴力是传统上男性行为的极端形式。

examples.english: The girls were all gazing adoringly at his muscular, virile young body.
examples.chinese: 女孩子们都崇拜地看着他那肌肉发达、充满阳刚之气的年轻身躯。

examples.english: Craig was a younger and more virile version of his father.
examples.chinese: 克雷格是他父亲的变体，但是更年青，更有阳刚之气。

examples.english: Reports have shown that the older a man gets, the more obsessed he is with his virility.
examples.chinese: 报告显示一个男人年纪越大，越着迷于自己的男子气概。

examples.english: In the portrait, the King looked manly and in control.
examples.chinese: 肖像画中，国王看上去男子气概十足，大权在握。

examples.english: He was bronzed and athletic, with manly features and a steady gaze.
examples.chinese: 他皮肤古铜色，体格健壮，长相英挺，目光坚毅。

examples.english: In the past, manliness was equated with silence about personal feelings.
examples.chinese: 过去人们把男性气概等同于不流露个人感情。

examples.english: On the outside he may seem to be very macho but inside he's very sensitive.
examples.chinese: 从外表看他可能很大男子气，但内心实际很敏感。

examples.english: He's far too macho to drink mineral water.
examples.chinese: 他太讲究男子气概，不会喝矿泉水的。

examples.english: Any other soldier would have told him to pull himself together and be a man.
examples.chinese: 其他任何一个士兵都会告诉他要镇定下来，要像个男子汉。

examples.english: A real man wouldn't be scared of commitment.
examples.chinese: 一个真正的男人是不会害怕承诺的。

examples.english: a he-man like Arnold Schwarzenegger
examples.chinese: 像阿诺德·施瓦辛格那样强壮勇敢的男子汉

expressions.text: be man enough to do something

examples.english: Are you man enough to admit that you've been lying?
examples.chinese: 你有没有足够的勇气承认你一直在撒谎？

examples.english: In an effort to prove his manhood he had taken to stealing cars and drinking alcohol.
examples.chinese: 为了证明自己的男子气概，他开始偷汽车、喝酒。

examples.english: The amount of laddish humour on TV these days can get a bit tedious.
examples.chinese: 现在电视上那么多的男孩式幽默有点令人生厌。

examples.english: He most famously played the part of Gary, the laddish flatmate in ‘Men Behaving Badly’.
examples.chinese: 他最有名的角色是扮演了加里，那个《不检点的男人》中的男孩气的同租房客。

centers.english: what you call a man when you speak to him
centers.chinese: 与男人讲话时对他的称呼

examples.english: I'm sorry sir, we're not serving chicken tonight. Can I recommend the fish?
examples.chinese: 很抱歉，先生，今晚我们没有鸡肉。我能向您推荐鱼吗？

examples.english: Dear Sir, I am writing to apply for the position of Sales Executive advertised in yesterday's ‘Times’.
examples.chinese: 亲爱的先生：昨日贵公司在《泰晤士报》上刊登招聘销售经理的广告，本人特写此信应聘。

examples.english: Mr Elstone, please may I borrow your pen?
examples.chinese: 埃尔斯顿先生，我能借你的钢笔用一用吗？

examples.english: Dear Mr. Pritchard, I am writing to remind you that your rent is now two months overdue.
examples.chinese: 亲爱的普里查德先生：您租金两月未付，兹特函通知。

examples.english: You look like you need a drink, mate.
examples.chinese: 你看来需要喝一杯，老兄。

examples.english: ‘Can I borrow your car’ - ‘No chance, mate.’
examples.chinese: “我能借用你的汽车吗？”“想也别想，老弟。”

examples.english: It's good to see you, buddy! How've you been?
examples.chinese: 见到你真高兴，老兄！你好吗？

examples.english: Hey, buddy! That's my parking space you took.
examples.chinese: 喂，伙计，你占的地方是我的停车位置！

examples.english: Hey, Mister! Look out!
examples.chinese: 喂，先生！当心！
